built with pdoc

zelos.runtime

Zelos Runtime — Main entry point. Ties together all Kernel components.

Phase 3: Fully integrated with Security, Multi-tenancy, Advanced Execution, Hot Reload, Container Isolation, Distributed Runtime, and CLI.

   1"""
   2Zelos Runtime — Main entry point. Ties together all Kernel components.
   3
   4Phase 3: Fully integrated with Security, Multi-tenancy, Advanced Execution,
   5         Hot Reload, Container Isolation, Distributed Runtime, and CLI.
   6"""
   7
   8import threading
   9import time
  10import uuid
  11from typing import Any
  12
  13from .advanced_execution import (
  14    DynamicPlanModifier,
  15    HumanInTheLoop,
  16    SubGoalManager,
  17)
  18from .capability_registry import CapabilityRegistry
  19from .config_loader import ConfigLoader
  20from .container_isolation import ContainerPluginConfig, ContainerRunner, RemotePlugin
  21from .distributed import ClusterNode, LeaderElection, NodeRegistry, WorkStealing
  22from .event_bus import EventBus
  23from .execution_engine import AgentState, ExecutionEngine
  24from .hot_reload import FileWatcher, HotReloadManager, UpgradeStrategy
  25from .memory import ContextAssembler, InMemoryMemoryProvider
  26from .multi_tenancy import ResourceQuota, TenantManager
  27from .planner import LLMPlanner, MockLLMProvider, PlannerPlan
  28from .plugin_manager import PluginLifecycleManager
  29from .policy import CompositePolicy
  30from .scheduler import PolicyPlugin, Scheduler, ScoringStrategy
  31
  32# ═══ Phase 3 imports ═══
  33from .security import AccessControl, APIKeyManager, AuditLogger, TLSConfig
  34from .task_graph import Task, TaskGraphEngine, TaskStatus
  35from .verifier import SchemaVerifier, VerificationGate
  36
  37
  38class ZelosRuntime:
  39    """Central entry point. Owns Kernel lifecycle and Agent lifecycle.
  40
  41    Supports:
  42      - Dict config: ZelosRuntime({"plugins": [...]})
  43      - YAML file:  ZelosRuntime.from_yaml("zelos.yaml")
  44
  45    Phase 3: Integrated security (RBAC + audit), multi-tenancy (quotas + isolation),
  46    advanced execution (dynamic plans + sub-goals + HITL), hot reload (strategies),
  47    and distributed coordination (leader election + work stealing).
  48    """
  49
  50    def __init__(self, config: dict[str, Any] | None = None):
  51        self.config = config or {}
  52
  53        # ── Phase 1 & 2: Kernel ──
  54        self._event_bus = EventBus()
  55        self._capability_registry = CapabilityRegistry()
  56        self._task_graph = TaskGraphEngine()
  57        self._plugin_manager = PluginLifecycleManager()
  58        self._scoring_strategy: ScoringStrategy | None = None
  59        self._policy_plugin: PolicyPlugin | None = None
  60        self._policy_engine: CompositePolicy | None = None
  61        self._planner: LLMPlanner | None = None
  62        self._verifier_gate: VerificationGate | None = None
  63        self._memory_provider: InMemoryMemoryProvider | None = None
  64        self._context_assembler: ContextAssembler | None = None
  65        self._scheduler: Scheduler | None = None
  66        self._execution_engine = ExecutionEngine(self._task_graph, self._event_bus)
  67        self._goals: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
  68        self._agents: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}  # name → {agent info}
  69        self._agent_instances: dict[str, Any] = {}  # name → agent object
  70        self._agent_threads: dict[str, threading.Thread] = {}
  71        self._orchestrator_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
  72        self._running = False
  73        self._lock = threading.RLock()
  74        self._started_at: float = 0.0
  75
  76        # ── Phase 3: Security ──
  77        sec_cfg = self.config.get("security", {})
  78        self._access_control = AccessControl()
  79        self._audit_logger = AuditLogger(max_events=sec_cfg.get("audit_max_events", 100000))
  80        self._api_key_manager = APIKeyManager()
  81        self._tls_config = TLSConfig(
  82            cert_file=sec_cfg.get("cert_file", ""),
  83            key_file=sec_cfg.get("key_file", ""),
  84            ca_file=sec_cfg.get("ca_file", ""),
  85            require_client_cert=sec_cfg.get("require_client_cert", True),
  86            min_tls_version=sec_cfg.get("min_tls_version", "TLSv1.2"),
  87            verify_hostname=sec_cfg.get("verify_hostname", True),
  88        )
  89
  90        # ── Phase 3: Multi-tenancy ──
  91        mt_cfg = self.config.get("multi_tenancy", {})
  92        self._tenant_manager = TenantManager()
  93        if mt_cfg.get("enabled", False):
  94            for tenant_spec in mt_cfg.get("tenants", []):
  95                self._tenant_manager.register_tenant(
  96                    tenant_id=tenant_spec["id"],
  97                    name=tenant_spec.get("name", ""),
  98                    quotas=ResourceQuota(**tenant_spec.get("quotas", {})),
  99                    metadata=tenant_spec.get("metadata", {}),
 100                )
 101
 102        # ── Phase 3: Advanced Execution ──
 103        self._plan_modifier = DynamicPlanModifier(self._task_graph)
 104        self._sub_goal_manager = SubGoalManager(self._task_graph)
 105        self._hitl = HumanInTheLoop()
 106
 107        # ── Phase 3: Hot Reload ──
 108        hr_cfg = self.config.get("hot_reload", {})
 109        strategy_name = hr_cfg.get("upgrade_strategy", "rolling")
 110        try:
 111            strategy = UpgradeStrategy(strategy_name)
 112        except ValueError:
 113            strategy = UpgradeStrategy.ROLLING
 114        self._hot_reload_manager = HotReloadManager(upgrade_strategy=strategy)
 115        self._file_watcher: FileWatcher | None = None
 116
 117        # ── Phase 3: Distributed ──
 118        dist_cfg = self.config.get("distributed", {})
 119        self._node_id = dist_cfg.get("node_id", f"zelos-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}")
 120        self._leader_election = LeaderElection(
 121            node_id=self._node_id,
 122            heartbeat_interval_ms=dist_cfg.get("heartbeat_ms", 500),
 123        )
 124        self._node_registry = NodeRegistry(heartbeat_timeout_seconds=dist_cfg.get("heartbeat_timeout_s", 30.0))
 125        self._work_stealing = WorkStealing(
 126            node_id=self._node_id,
 127            max_concurrent_tasks=dist_cfg.get("max_concurrent_tasks", 50),
 128        )
 129        self._cluster_enabled = dist_cfg.get("enabled", False)
 130
 131        # ── Phase 3: Container / Remote isolation ──
 132        self._container_runners: dict[str, ContainerRunner] = {}  # plugin_id → runner
 133        self._remote_plugins: dict[str, RemotePlugin] = {}  # plugin_id → remote
 134        self._remote_health_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
 135
 136    @classmethod
 137    def from_yaml(cls, path: str = "zelos.yaml") -> "ZelosRuntime":
 138        """Create a ZelosRuntime from a zelos.yaml configuration file."""
 139        loader = ConfigLoader()
 140        config = loader.load(path)
 141        return cls(config)
 142
 143    # ═══════════════════ Auth Helper ═══════════════════
 144
 145    def _check_auth(
 146        self, auth_context: dict[str, Any] | None, action: str, resource: str = ""
 147    ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 148        """Check permission. Returns error dict if denied, None if allowed."""
 149        if auth_context is None or auth_context == {}:
 150            return None  # Backward compat: no auth = admin
 151
 152        # API key auth
 153        api_key = auth_context.get("api_key")
 154        if api_key:
 155            key_info = self._api_key_manager.validate(api_key)
 156            if not key_info:
 157                return {"status": "rejected", "reason": "Invalid or expired API key"}
 158            role = key_info["role"]
 159        else:
 160            role = auth_context.get("role", "viewer")
 161
 162        if not self._access_control.check(role, action):
 163            self._audit_logger.log(
 164                actor=auth_context.get("actor", "unknown"),
 165                action=action,
 166                resource=resource,
 167                detail=f"Permission denied for role '{role}'",
 168                result="denied",
 169            )
 170            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Permission denied: role '{role}' cannot '{action}'"}
 171        return None
 172
 173    def _audit(self, actor: str, action: str, resource: str, detail: str = "", result: str = "success", **meta) -> None:
 174        """Record an audit event (fire-and-forget)."""
 175        try:
 176            self._audit_logger.log(actor=actor, action=action, resource=resource, detail=detail, result=result, **meta)
 177        except Exception:
 178            pass
 179
 180    def _resolve_tenant(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> str:
 181        """Get tenant_id from auth context, or 'default'."""
 182        if auth_context and auth_context.get("tenant_id"):
 183            return auth_context["tenant_id"]
 184        return "default"
 185
 186    # ═══════════════════ Agent Management ═══════════════════
 187
 188    def add_agent(
 189        self,
 190        name: str,
 191        entrypoint: str,
 192        capabilities: list[Any],
 193        *,
 194        max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5,
 195        heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000,
 196        restart_policy: str = "always",
 197        config: dict | None = None,
 198        auth_context: dict | None = None,
 199    ) -> str:
 200        """Register an agent. If Runtime is running, hot-join.
 201
 202        Phase 3: Enforces RBAC + tenant agent quota + audit logging.
 203        """
 204        # Auth check
 205        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"agent:{name}")
 206        if err:
 207            return err
 208
 209        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 210        tenant = self._tenant_manager.get_tenant(tenant_id)
 211        if tenant and not tenant.active:
 212            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Tenant '{tenant_id}' is deactivated"}
 213
 214        # Tenant agent quota
 215        ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
 216        if ns and not ns.check_quota("agents"):
 217            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Agent quota exceeded for tenant '{tenant_id}'"}
 218
 219        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
 220        agent_info = {
 221            "agent_id": agent_id,
 222            "name": name,
 223            "entrypoint": entrypoint,
 224            "capabilities": capabilities,
 225            "max_concurrent_tasks": max_concurrent_tasks,
 226            "heartbeat_interval_ms": heartbeat_interval_ms,
 227            "restart_policy": restart_policy,
 228            "config": config or {},
 229            "tenant_id": tenant_id,
 230        }
 231        with self._lock:
 232            self._agents[name] = agent_info
 233
 234        if ns:
 235            ns.add_agent(agent_id)
 236
 237        self._audit(
 238            actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
 239            action="agent.register",
 240            resource=agent_id,
 241            detail=f"Registered agent '{name}' in tenant '{tenant_id}'",
 242        )
 243
 244        if self._running:
 245            self._start_agent(name, agent_info)
 246
 247        return agent_id
 248
 249    def remove_agent(self, name_or_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict | None:
 250        """Remove an agent (hot-leave). Phase 3: RBAC + audit."""
 251        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.remove", f"agent:{name_or_id}")
 252        if err:
 253            return err
 254
 255        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 256        agent_info = None
 257        with self._lock:
 258            for name, info in self._agents.items():
 259                if name == name_or_id or info["agent_id"] == name_or_id:
 260                    if tenant_id != "default" and info.get("tenant_id", "default") != tenant_id:
 261                        return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Agent not in tenant '{tenant_id}'"}
 262                    agent_info = info
 263                    del self._agents[name]
 264                    break
 265        if agent_info:
 266            self._execution_engine.remove_agent(agent_info["agent_id"])
 267            self._capability_registry.remove_agent(agent_info["agent_id"])
 268            ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
 269            if ns:
 270                ns.remove_agent(agent_info["agent_id"])
 271            self._audit(
 272                actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
 273                action="agent.remove",
 274                resource=agent_info["agent_id"],
 275                detail=f"Removed agent '{name_or_id}'",
 276            )
 277        return None
 278
 279    def list_agents(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 280        """List agents. Phase 3: tenant-filtered."""
 281        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 282        result = []
 283        for agent in self._execution_engine.list_agents():
 284            # Tenant filter
 285            agent_tenant = "default"
 286            for info in self._agents.values():
 287                if info["agent_id"] == agent.agent_id:
 288                    agent_tenant = info.get("tenant_id", "default")
 289                    break
 290            if tenant_id != "default" and agent_tenant != tenant_id:
 291                continue
 292
 293            result.append(
 294                {
 295                    "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
 296                    "name": agent.agent_name,
 297                    "status": agent.status,
 298                    "operational_state": agent.operational_state,
 299                    "current_tasks": len(agent.current_tasks),
 300                    "max_concurrent_tasks": agent.max_concurrent_tasks,
 301                    "tenant_id": agent_tenant,
 302                }
 303            )
 304        return result
 305
 306    def get_agent(self, name_or_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 307        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 308        for agent in self._execution_engine.list_agents():
 309            if agent.agent_id == name_or_id or agent.agent_name == name_or_id:
 310                agent_tenant = "default"
 311                for info in self._agents.values():
 312                    if info["agent_id"] == agent.agent_id:
 313                        agent_tenant = info.get("tenant_id", "default")
 314                        break
 315                if tenant_id != "default" and agent_tenant != tenant_id:
 316                    return None
 317                return {
 318                    "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
 319                    "name": agent.agent_name,
 320                    "status": agent.status,
 321                    "operational_state": agent.operational_state,
 322                    "capabilities": agent.capabilities,
 323                    "current_tasks": agent.current_tasks,
 324                    "max_concurrent_tasks": agent.max_concurrent_tasks,
 325                    "historical_success_rate": agent.historical_success_rate,
 326                    "total_completed": agent.total_completed,
 327                    "total_failed": agent.total_failed,
 328                    "tenant_id": agent_tenant,
 329                }
 330        return None
 331
 332    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Container / Remote Plugin Management ═══════════════════
 333
 334    def add_container_agent(
 335        self,
 336        name: str,
 337        container_config: ContainerPluginConfig,
 338        capabilities: list[Any],
 339        auth_context: dict | None = None,
 340    ) -> str:
 341        """Register an agent running in a Docker/Podman container.
 342
 343        The container is actually started via subprocess. If the runtime
 344        is not installed, falls back gracefully.
 345        """
 346        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"container:{name}")
 347        if err:
 348            return err
 349
 350        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
 351        cap_dicts = []
 352        for c in capabilities:
 353            if hasattr(c, "to_dict"):
 354                cap_dicts.append(c.to_dict())
 355            elif isinstance(c, dict):
 356                cap_dicts.append(c)
 357            else:
 358                cap_dicts.append({"name": str(c), "version": "1.0.0"})
 359
 360        self._capability_registry.register(agent_id, name, cap_dicts)
 361        self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 362
 363        runner = ContainerRunner(container_config)
 364        started = runner.start()
 365        self._container_runners[agent_id] = runner
 366
 367        self._audit(
 368            "system",
 369            "container.agent.add",
 370            agent_id,
 371            detail=f"Container agent '{name}' ({'started' if started else 'pending'})",
 372        )
 373
 374        return agent_id
 375
 376    def add_remote_agent(
 377        self, name: str, remote_plugin: RemotePlugin, capabilities: list[Any], auth_context: dict | None = None
 378    ) -> str:
 379        """Register an agent that runs on a remote host via HTTP."""
 380        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"remote:{name}")
 381        if err:
 382            return err
 383
 384        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
 385        cap_dicts = []
 386        for c in capabilities:
 387            if hasattr(c, "to_dict"):
 388                cap_dicts.append(c.to_dict())
 389            elif isinstance(c, dict):
 390                cap_dicts.append(c)
 391            else:
 392                cap_dicts.append({"name": str(c), "version": "1.0.0"})
 393
 394        self._capability_registry.register(agent_id, name, cap_dicts)
 395        self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 396
 397        remote_plugin.plugin_id = agent_id
 398        self._remote_plugins[agent_id] = remote_plugin
 399
 400        # Start remote health monitor if not already running
 401        if self._remote_health_thread is None and self._running:
 402            self._remote_health_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._remote_health_loop, daemon=True)
 403            self._remote_health_thread.start()
 404
 405        self._audit("system", "remote.agent.add", agent_id, detail=f"Remote agent '{name}' at {remote_plugin.endpoint}")
 406
 407        return agent_id
 408
 409    def _remote_health_loop(self) -> None:
 410        """Background loop: periodic health checks for remote plugins."""
 411        while self._running:
 412            for agent_id, rp in list(self._remote_plugins.items()):
 413                rp.health_check()
 414                if not rp.is_healthy:
 415                    self._capability_registry.mark_unavailable(agent_id)
 416                else:
 417                    self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 418            time.sleep(15.0)  # Check every 15 seconds
 419
 420    def _dispatch_to_remote(self, agent_id: str, task: Task) -> bool:
 421        """Dispatch a task to a remote plugin via HTTP."""
 422        rp = self._remote_plugins.get(agent_id)
 423        if not rp:
 424            return False
 425        task_dict = {
 426            "task_id": task.task_id,
 427            "plan_id": task.plan_id,
 428            "description": task.description,
 429            "required_capability": task.required_capability,
 430            "priority": task.priority,
 431            "timeout_ms": task.timeout_ms,
 432        }
 433        result = rp.dispatch(task_dict)
 434        if result and result.get("status") == "completed":
 435            self._execution_engine.submit_result(task.task_id, agent_id, result)
 436            self._audit("system", "task.completed", task.task_id, detail=f"Remote dispatch to {agent_id}")
 437            return True
 438        elif result and result.get("status") == "failed":
 439            self._execution_engine.submit_result(task.task_id, agent_id, result)
 440            self._audit(
 441                "system",
 442                "task.failed",
 443                task.task_id,
 444                detail=f"Remote dispatch failed: {result.get('error', {}).get('message', '')}",
 445            )
 446            return True
 447        return False
 448
 449    # ═══════════════════ Runtime Lifecycle ═══════════════════
 450
 451    def start(self) -> None:
 452        """Start the Runtime Kernel and all registered agents. Phase 3: init all new components."""
 453        with self._lock:
 454            if self._running:
 455                return
 456
 457            # Load plugins
 458            plugin_configs = []
 459            if "plugins" in self.config:
 460                plugin_configs = self.config["plugins"]
 461            manifests = self._plugin_manager.discover_from_config(plugin_configs)
 462            self._plugin_manager.load_all(manifests)
 463
 464            # Extract scoring strategy and policy from plugins
 465            for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
 466                if inst.manifest.plugin_type == "scoring_strategy" and inst.instance:
 467                    self._scoring_strategy = inst.instance
 468                elif inst.manifest.plugin_type == "policy" and inst.instance:
 469                    self._policy_plugin = inst.instance
 470
 471            # Planner: from plugin config or direct config
 472            planner_loaded = False
 473            for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
 474                if inst.manifest.plugin_type == "planner" and inst.instance:
 475                    self._planner = inst.instance
 476                    planner_loaded = True
 477                    # Register with hot reload manager
 478                    self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(
 479                        plugin_id=inst.manifest.plugin_id,
 480                        version="1.0.0",
 481                        entrypoint=inst.manifest.entrypoint,
 482                        checksum="initial",
 483                    )
 484                    break
 485
 486            if not planner_loaded:
 487                planner_config = self.config.get("planner") or {}
 488                for cfg in self.config.get("plugins", []):
 489                    if cfg.get("type") == "planner":
 490                        planner_config = cfg.get("config", {})
 491                        break
 492                if planner_config:
 493                    try:
 494                        self._planner = LLMPlanner(planner_config)
 495                    except Exception:
 496                        pass
 497
 498            if self._planner is None:
 499                self._planner = LLMPlanner({"provider": "mock"})
 500                self._planner._provider = MockLLMProvider(
 501                    response='{"tasks":[{"task_id":"t1","description":"Execute the goal","required_capability":"code-generation.python"}],"dependencies":[]}'
 502                )
 503
 504            # Initialize Memory Provider
 505            if self._memory_provider is None:
 506                self._memory_provider = InMemoryMemoryProvider()
 507                self._context_assembler = ContextAssembler(self._memory_provider)
 508
 509            # Initialize Verifier Gate
 510            if self._verifier_gate is None:
 511                self._verifier_gate = VerificationGate()
 512                self._verifier_gate.add_verifier(SchemaVerifier())
 513
 514            # Initialize Policy Engine
 515            if self._policy_engine is None:
 516                self._policy_engine = CompositePolicy()
 517
 518            # Initialize Scheduler
 519            self._scheduler = Scheduler(
 520                self._task_graph,
 521                self._capability_registry,
 522                scoring_strategy=self._scoring_strategy,
 523                policy_plugin=self._policy_plugin,
 524            )
 525
 526            # Set up Execution Engine callbacks
 527            self._execution_engine._agent_dispatch = self._on_dispatch
 528
 529            # Start all agents
 530            for name, info in list(self._agents.items()):
 531                self._start_agent(name, info)
 532
 533            # Start timeout monitor
 534            self._execution_engine.start_monitor()
 535
 536            # ── Phase 3: Start File Watcher (hot reload) ──
 537            hr_cfg = self.config.get("hot_reload", {})
 538            plugin_dir = hr_cfg.get("plugin_dir")
 539            if plugin_dir:
 540                self._file_watcher = FileWatcher(
 541                    plugin_dir,
 542                    patterns=hr_cfg.get("watch_patterns", ["*.py"]),
 543                    poll_interval_ms=hr_cfg.get("poll_interval_ms", 500),
 544                )
 545                self._file_watcher.on_change(self._on_plugin_file_change)
 546                self._file_watcher.start()
 547
 548            # ── Phase 3: Start Leader Election (if cluster enabled) ──
 549            dist_cfg = self.config.get("distributed", {})
 550            self._cluster_enabled = dist_cfg.get("enabled", False)
 551            if self._cluster_enabled:
 552                # Register self
 553                host = dist_cfg.get("host", "127.0.0.1")
 554                port = dist_cfg.get("port", 9876)
 555                caps = dist_cfg.get("capabilities", [])
 556                self._node_registry.register(
 557                    ClusterNode(
 558                        node_id=self._node_id,
 559                        host=host,
 560                        port=port,
 561                        capabilities=caps,
 562                        capacity=dist_cfg.get("capacity", 20),
 563                    )
 564                )
 565                # Register peers
 566                for peer in dist_cfg.get("peers", []):
 567                    self._leader_election.register_peer(peer["node_id"], peer.get("priority", 0))
 568                    self._node_registry.register(
 569                        ClusterNode(
 570                            node_id=peer["node_id"],
 571                            host=peer.get("host", ""),
 572                            port=peer.get("port", 9876),
 573                            capabilities=peer.get("capabilities", []),
 574                            capacity=peer.get("capacity", 10),
 575                        )
 576                    )
 577                self._leader_election.start()
 578
 579            self._running = True
 580            self._started_at = time.time()
 581
 582            # Start orchestrator loop (background thread)
 583            self._orchestrator_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._orchestrator_loop, daemon=True)
 584            self._orchestrator_thread.start()
 585
 586    def shutdown(self) -> None:
 587        """Graceful shutdown of Runtime and all agents."""
 588        self._running = False
 589        self._execution_engine.stop_monitor()
 590
 591        if self._orchestrator_thread and self._orchestrator_thread.is_alive():
 592            self._orchestrator_thread.join(timeout=5.0)
 593
 594        # Cancel all in-flight tasks
 595        for tid in list(self._execution_engine._in_flight.keys()):
 596            self._execution_engine.cancel_task(tid)
 597
 598        # Stop all agent threads
 599        for _name, thread in list(self._agent_threads.items()):
 600            if thread.is_alive():
 601                thread.join(timeout=5.0)
 602
 603        # Stop all plugins
 604        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
 605            self._plugin_manager.stop_plugin(inst.manifest.plugin_id)
 606
 607        # Phase 3: Stop file watcher
 608        if self._file_watcher:
 609            self._file_watcher.stop()
 610
 611        # Phase 3: Stop leader election
 612        if self._cluster_enabled:
 613            self._leader_election.stop()
 614
 615        # Phase 3: Drain hot reload versions
 616        for p in self._hot_reload_manager.list_plugins():
 617            for v in self._hot_reload_manager.get_versions(p["plugin_id"]):
 618                if v.status == "active":
 619                    self._hot_reload_manager.drain_version(p["plugin_id"], v.version)
 620
 621    def _orchestrator_loop(self) -> None:
 622        """Background loop: evaluate deps → schedule → dispatch → escalate → verify.
 623
 624        Phase 3 additions:
 625          - HITL approval check before dispatching tasks that require approval
 626          - Work stealing from peer nodes (when cluster enabled)
 627          - Dead node detection and cleanup
 628        """
 629        poll_interval = 0.5
 630        READY_TIMEOUT = 60.0
 631        _stuck_since: dict[str, float] = {}
 632
 633        while self._running:
 634            try:
 635                # 1. Evaluate dependencies → CREATED → READY
 636                newly_ready = self._task_graph.evaluate_all()
 637                for tid in newly_ready:
 638                    _stuck_since.pop(tid, None)
 639
 640                # 2. Schedule all READY tasks (skip those awaiting HITL approval)
 641                if self._scheduler:
 642                    # Check HITL timeouts
 643                    self._hitl.check_timeouts()
 644
 645                    assignments = self._scheduler.schedule()
 646                    dispatched_ids = set()
 647                    for a in assignments:
 648                        tid = a["task_id"]
 649                        aid = a["agent_id"]
 650                        task = self._task_graph.get_task(tid)
 651                        if task and task.status == TaskStatus.ASSIGNED:
 652                            # HITL gate: if task requires approval, block dispatch
 653                            pending_list = self._hitl.list_pending()
 654                            if any(r.task_id == tid for r in pending_list):
 655                                continue
 656                            self._execution_engine.dispatch(tid, aid)
 657                            dispatched_ids.add(tid)
 658
 659                    # Three-Tier Escalation for Unscheduled READY Tasks
 660                    now = time.time()
 661                    ready_tasks = self._task_graph.get_ready_tasks()
 662
 663                    for task in ready_tasks:
 664                        tid = task.task_id
 665                        if tid in dispatched_ids:
 666                            _stuck_since.pop(tid, None)
 667                            continue
 668                        if tid not in _stuck_since:
 669                            _stuck_since[tid] = now
 670                            continue
 671                        stuck_duration = now - _stuck_since[tid]
 672                        if stuck_duration > READY_TIMEOUT:
 673                            try:
 674                                self._task_graph.transition(tid, TaskStatus.FAILED)
 675                            except ValueError:
 676                                pass
 677                            _stuck_since.pop(tid, None)
 678                            self._try_replan(task)
 679
 680                # 3. Check Goal completion + Sub-goal completion
 681                with self._lock:
 682                    for goal_id, goal in list(self._goals.items()):
 683                        if goal["status"] in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
 684                            continue
 685                        plan_id = goal.get("plan_id")
 686                        all_tasks = [t for t in self._task_graph.list_tasks() if t.plan_id == plan_id]
 687                        if not all_tasks:
 688                            continue
 689                        terminal = {TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED}
 690                        all_done = all(t.status in terminal for t in all_tasks)
 691                        if all_done:
 692                            all_completed = all(t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED for t in all_tasks)
 693                            goal["status"] = "completed" if all_completed else "failed"
 694                            goal["completed_at"] = now
 695                            self._audit(
 696                                "system",
 697                                "goal.completed" if all_completed else "goal.failed",
 698                                goal_id,
 699                                detail=goal.get("description", ""),
 700                            )
 701
 702                # 4. Phase 3: Distributed — real work stealing + dead node cleanup
 703                if self._cluster_enabled:
 704                    # Find the most overloaded peer
 705                    peers = [
 706                        n
 707                        for n in self._node_registry.list_nodes()
 708                        if n.node_id != self._node_id and n.status == "healthy"
 709                    ]
 710                    for _peer in peers:
 711                        if self._work_stealing.can_accept_more():
 712                            # Steal READY tasks from overloaded peers
 713                            our_depth = self._work_stealing.queue_size()
 714                            # Local heuristic: steal from anyone while we have capacity
 715                            if our_depth < self._work_stealing.max_concurrent_tasks / 2:
 716                                # Pull tasks from the distributed ready-task pool
 717                                ready = self._task_graph.get_ready_tasks()
 718                                for rt in ready:
 719                                    if self._work_stealing.can_accept_more():
 720                                        self._work_stealing.enqueue_task(
 721                                            rt.task_id, rt.required_capability, priority=rt.priority
 722                                        )
 723                                    else:
 724                                        break
 725
 726                    # Detect dead nodes and clean up
 727                    dead = self._node_registry.detect_dead_nodes()
 728                    for dead_id in dead:
 729                        self._node_registry.deregister(dead_id)
 730
 731                # 5. Phase 3: Dispatch to remote plugins
 732                for agent_id in list(self._remote_plugins.keys()):
 733                    rp = self._remote_plugins.get(agent_id)
 734                    if rp and rp.is_healthy:
 735                        # Check for tasks assigned to this remote agent
 736                        for inflight_id, ft in list(self._execution_engine._in_flight.items()):
 737                            if ft.agent_id == agent_id:
 738                                self._dispatch_to_remote(agent_id, self._task_graph.get_task(inflight_id))
 739
 740            except Exception:
 741                pass
 742
 743            time.sleep(poll_interval)
 744
 745    def _try_replan(self, failed_task: Task) -> None:
 746        """Tier 3: Ask Planner to find an alternative way to achieve the goal."""
 747        if self._planner is None:
 748            return
 749        plan_id = failed_task.plan_id
 750        goal_description = ""
 751        goal_id = ""
 752        for gid, g in self._goals.items():
 753            if g.get("plan_id") == plan_id:
 754                goal_description = g.get("description", "")
 755                goal_id = gid
 756                break
 757        if not goal_description:
 758            return
 759
 760        try:
 761            current_tasks = [t for t in self._task_graph.list_tasks() if t.plan_id == plan_id]
 762            current_plan = PlannerPlan(
 763                plan_id=plan_id,
 764                goal_id=goal_id,
 765                tasks=[],
 766                dependencies=[],
 767                version=1,
 768            )
 769            from .planner import PlannerTask as PT
 770
 771            for t in current_tasks:
 772                current_plan.tasks.append(
 773                    PT(
 774                        task_id=t.task_id,
 775                        description=t.description,
 776                        required_capability=t.required_capability,
 777                        dependencies=list(t.dependencies),
 778                    )
 779                )
 780            current_plan.version = len([t for t in current_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED]) + 1
 781
 782            new_plan = self._planner.replan(
 783                goal_description,
 784                current_plan,
 785                [
 786                    {
 787                        "event_type": "task.failed",
 788                        "task_id": failed_task.task_id,
 789                        "reason": f"no agent provides capability: {failed_task.required_capability}",
 790                    }
 791                ],
 792            )
 793
 794            for pt in new_plan.tasks:
 795                if pt.task_id not in self._task_graph._tasks:
 796                    task = Task(
 797                        task_id=pt.task_id,
 798                        plan_id=plan_id,
 799                        description=pt.description,
 800                        required_capability=pt.required_capability,
 801                        dependencies=list(pt.dependencies),
 802                        priority=pt.priority,
 803                        timeout_ms=pt.timeout_ms,
 804                    )
 805                    self._task_graph.add_task(task)
 806
 807            for dep in new_plan.dependencies:
 808                try:
 809                    self._task_graph.add_dependency(dep["from_task_id"], dep["to_task_id"])
 810                except ValueError:
 811                    pass
 812
 813            self._task_graph.evaluate_all()
 814            self._plan_modifier._log_modification(
 815                "replan", plan_id, {"new_tasks": len(new_plan.tasks), "old_tasks": len(current_tasks)}
 816            )
 817
 818        except Exception:
 819            pass
 820
 821    def _start_agent(self, name: str, info: dict) -> None:
 822        """Start an agent: register, heartbeat, make available."""
 823        agent_id = info["agent_id"]
 824
 825        self._execution_engine.register_agent(
 826            agent_id=agent_id,
 827            agent_name=name,
 828            max_concurrent_tasks=info["max_concurrent_tasks"],
 829            heartbeat_interval_ms=info["heartbeat_interval_ms"],
 830        )
 831
 832        caps = info["capabilities"]
 833        cap_dicts = []
 834        for c in caps:
 835            if hasattr(c, "to_dict"):
 836                cap_dicts.append(c.to_dict())
 837            elif isinstance(c, dict):
 838                cap_dicts.append(c)
 839            else:
 840                cap_dicts.append(
 841                    {
 842                        "name": getattr(c, "name", str(c)),
 843                        "version": getattr(c, "version", "1.0.0"),
 844                        "description": getattr(c, "description", ""),
 845                        "input_schema": getattr(c, "input_schema", {}),
 846                        "output_schema": getattr(c, "output_schema", {}),
 847                        "tags": getattr(c, "tags", []),
 848                    }
 849                )
 850        self._capability_registry.register(agent_id, name, cap_dicts)
 851        self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 852
 853        self._execution_engine.heartbeat(agent_id)
 854
 855        entrypoint = info["entrypoint"]
 856        if ":" in entrypoint:
 857            module_path, class_name = entrypoint.split(":", 1)
 858            try:
 859                import importlib
 860
 861                mod = importlib.import_module(module_path)
 862                cls = getattr(mod, class_name)
 863                agent_instance = cls(name=name, **info.get("config", {}))
 864                self._agent_instances[name] = agent_instance
 865                thread = threading.Thread(
 866                    target=self._agent_loop,
 867                    args=(name, agent_instance, agent_id),
 868                    daemon=True,
 869                )
 870                self._agent_threads[name] = thread
 871                thread.start()
 872            except (ImportError, AttributeError):
 873                pass
 874
 875    def _agent_loop(self, name: str, agent_instance: Any, agent_id: str) -> None:
 876        """Background loop for an in-process agent."""
 877        while self._running:
 878            try:
 879                self._execution_engine.heartbeat(agent_id)
 880            except Exception:
 881                pass
 882            time.sleep(
 883                self._execution_engine._agents.get(
 884                    agent_id, AgentState(agent_id="", agent_name="")
 885                ).heartbeat_interval_ms
 886                / 1000
 887            )
 888
 889    def _on_dispatch(self, agent_id: str, task: Task) -> None:
 890        """Called when Execution Engine dispatches a task.
 891
 892        Phase 3: Checks HITL approval before executing. Logs audit events.
 893        """
 894        # HITL gate: check if this task has a pending approval
 895        pending = self._hitl.list_pending()
 896        for req in pending:
 897            if req.task_id == task.task_id:
 898                # Task awaiting approval — don't execute yet
 899                return
 900
 901        self._audit("system", "task.dispatched", task.task_id, detail=f"Dispatched to agent {agent_id}")
 902
 903        for name, info in self._agents.items():
 904            if info["agent_id"] == agent_id:
 905                agent = self._agent_instances.get(name)
 906                if agent and hasattr(agent, "execute"):
 907                    try:
 908                        artifact = agent.execute(task)
 909                        result = {
 910                            "status": "completed",
 911                            "artifact": {
 912                                "content_type": getattr(artifact, "content_type", "application/json"),
 913                                "content": getattr(artifact, "content", artifact)
 914                                if hasattr(artifact, "content")
 915                                else str(artifact),
 916                            },
 917                        }
 918                        self._execution_engine.submit_result(task.task_id, agent_id, result)
 919                        self._audit("system", "task.completed", task.task_id, result="success")
 920                    except Exception as e:
 921                        self._execution_engine.submit_result(
 922                            task.task_id,
 923                            agent_id,
 924                            {"status": "failed", "error": {"code": "internal_error", "message": str(e)}},
 925                        )
 926                        self._audit("system", "task.failed", task.task_id, result="failed", detail=str(e))
 927                else:
 928                    print(f"  🤖 [{name}] → {task.required_capability}: {task.description[:60]}...")
 929                    self._execution_engine.submit_result(
 930                        task.task_id,
 931                        agent_id,
 932                        {
 933                            "status": "completed",
 934                            "artifact": {
 935                                "content_type": "application/json",
 936                                "content": {"result": f"Task {task.task_id} completed"},
 937                            },
 938                        },
 939                    )
 940                    self._audit("system", "task.completed", task.task_id, detail="auto-completed (demo mode)")
 941
 942    # ═══════════════════ Goal Submission ═══════════════════
 943
 944    def submit_goal(
 945        self,
 946        description: str,
 947        *,
 948        budget: float | None = None,
 949        deadline: str | None = None,
 950        priority: str = "medium",
 951        project_id: str | None = None,
 952        metadata: dict | None = None,
 953        auth_context: dict | None = None,
 954        require_approval: bool = False,
 955        approvers: list[str] | None = None,
 956    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 957        """Submit a Goal. Phase 3: RBAC + tenant quota + audit.
 958
 959        Args:
 960            require_approval: If True, creates HITL approval before tasks dispatch.
 961            approvers: List of approver IDs for HITL.
 962        """
 963        if not description or not description.strip():
 964            return {"goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()), "status": "rejected", "reason": "Description is required"}
 965
 966        if priority not in ("low", "medium", "high", "critical"):
 967            return {
 968                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
 969                "status": "rejected",
 970                "reason": f"Invalid priority: {priority}",
 971                "validation_errors": ["priority must be one of: low, medium, high, critical"],
 972            }
 973
 974        # Auth
 975        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "goal.submit", "goal:new")
 976        if err:
 977            return err
 978
 979        # Tenant
 980        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 981        tenant = self._tenant_manager.get_tenant(tenant_id)
 982        if tenant and not tenant.active:
 983            return {
 984                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
 985                "status": "rejected",
 986                "reason": f"Tenant '{tenant_id}' is deactivated",
 987            }
 988
 989        ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
 990        if ns and not ns.check_quota("goals"):
 991            return {
 992                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
 993                "status": "rejected",
 994                "reason": f"Goal quota exceeded for tenant '{tenant_id}'",
 995            }
 996
 997        if budget and ns and not ns.quotas.check_budget(budget):
 998            return {
 999                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
1000                "status": "rejected",
1001                "reason": f"Budget ${budget} exceeds per-goal limit ${ns.quotas.budget_per_goal}",
1002            }
1003
1004        goal_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
1005        plan_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
1006
1007        goal = {
1008            "goal_id": goal_id,
1009            "description": description,
1010            "status": "accepted",
1011            "budget": budget,
1012            "deadline": deadline,
1013            "priority": priority,
1014            "project_id": project_id,
1015            "metadata": metadata or {},
1016            "plan_id": plan_id,
1017            "tenant_id": tenant_id,
1018            "created_at": time.time(),
1019            "updated_at": time.time(),
1020            "completed_at": None,
1021            "progress": {
1022                "total_tasks": 0,
1023                "completed_tasks": 0,
1024                "failed_tasks": 0,
1025                "ready_tasks": 0,
1026                "in_flight_tasks": 0,
1027                "blocked_tasks": 0,
1028                "percent_complete": 0.0,
1029            },
1030        }
1031        with self._lock:
1032            self._goals[goal_id] = goal
1033
1034        if ns:
1035            ns.add_goal(goal_id)
1036
1037        # HITL: create approval request if required
1038        if require_approval and approvers:
1039            self._hitl.create_request(
1040                task_id=f"{goal_id}-approval",
1041                description=f"Goal approval: {description[:80]}",
1042                approvers=approvers,
1043                context={"goal_id": goal_id, "budget": budget, "priority": priority},
1044                require_all=len(approvers) > 1,
1045            )
1046
1047        self._audit(
1048            actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1049            action="goal.submit",
1050            resource=goal_id,
1051            detail=f"'{description[:60]}' in tenant '{tenant_id}'",
1052            budget=budget,
1053            priority=priority,
1054        )
1055
1056        # Planner: decompose Goal → Tasks
1057        if self._planner is not None and self._running:
1058            try:
1059                planner_plan = self._planner.plan(description, goal_id=goal_id)
1060                planner_plan.plan_id = plan_id
1061            except Exception:
1062                from .planner import PlannerTask as PT
1063
1064                planner_plan = PlannerPlan(
1065                    plan_id=plan_id,
1066                    goal_id=goal_id,
1067                    tasks=[],
1068                    planner_id="fallback",
1069                )
1070                planner_plan.tasks.append(
1071                    PT(
1072                        task_id=f"{goal_id}-t1",
1073                        description=description,
1074                        required_capability="code-generation.python",
1075                    )
1076                )
1077
1078            for pt in planner_plan.tasks:
1079                task = Task(
1080                    task_id=pt.task_id,
1081                    plan_id=plan_id,
1082                    description=pt.description,
1083                    required_capability=pt.required_capability,
1084                    dependencies=list(pt.dependencies),
1085                    priority=pt.priority,
1086                    timeout_ms=pt.timeout_ms,
1087                )
1088                self._task_graph.add_task(task)
1089
1090            for dep in planner_plan.dependencies:
1091                try:
1092                    self._task_graph.add_dependency(dep["from_task_id"], dep["to_task_id"])
1093                except ValueError:
1094                    pass
1095
1096            self._task_graph.evaluate_all()
1097
1098            goal["status"] = "planned"
1099            goal["plan_id"] = plan_id
1100            goal["updated_at"] = time.time()
1101
1102        task_count = len([t for t in self._task_graph.list_tasks() if t.plan_id == plan_id])
1103
1104        return {
1105            "goal_id": goal_id,
1106            "status": goal["status"],
1107            "created_at": goal["created_at"],
1108            "plan_id": plan_id,
1109            "task_count": task_count,
1110        }
1111
1112    def get_goal_status(self, goal_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1113        """Get goal status. Phase 3: tenant-filtered."""
1114        goal = self._goals.get(goal_id)
1115        if not goal:
1116            return None
1117
1118        # Tenant isolation
1119        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
1120        if tenant_id != "default" and goal.get("tenant_id", "default") != tenant_id:
1121            return None
1122
1123        tasks = self._task_graph.list_tasks()
1124        plan_id = goal.get("plan_id", "")
1125        goal_tasks = [t for t in tasks if t.plan_id == plan_id]
1126
1127        total = len(goal_tasks)
1128        completed = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED)
1129        failed = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.FAILED)
1130        ready = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.READY)
1131        in_flight = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status in (TaskStatus.ASSIGNED, TaskStatus.STARTED))
1132        blocked = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.CREATED)
1133
1134        goal["progress"] = {
1135            "total_tasks": total,
1136            "completed_tasks": completed,
1137            "failed_tasks": failed,
1138            "ready_tasks": ready,
1139            "in_flight_tasks": in_flight,
1140            "blocked_tasks": blocked,
1141            "percent_complete": (completed / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0.0,
1142        }
1143        goal["updated_at"] = time.time()
1144        return {
1145            "goal_id": goal["goal_id"],
1146            "status": goal["status"],
1147            "plan_id": goal["plan_id"],
1148            "progress": goal["progress"],
1149            "created_at": goal["created_at"],
1150            "updated_at": goal["updated_at"],
1151            "completed_at": goal["completed_at"],
1152            "tenant_id": goal.get("tenant_id", "default"),
1153        }
1154
1155    def cancel_goal(self, goal_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1156        """Cancel a goal. Phase 3: RBAC + audit."""
1157        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "goal.cancel", goal_id)
1158        if err:
1159            return err
1160
1161        goal = self._goals.get(goal_id)
1162        if not goal:
1163            return None
1164        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
1165        if tenant_id != "default" and goal.get("tenant_id", "default") != tenant_id:
1166            return {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "rejected", "reason": "Goal not in this tenant"}
1167
1168        if goal["status"] in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
1169            return {
1170                "goal_id": goal_id,
1171                "status": goal["status"],
1172                "error": {"code": "conflict", "message": "Goal is already in a terminal state"},
1173            }
1174        goal["status"] = "cancelled"
1175        goal["completed_at"] = time.time()
1176        self._audit(
1177            actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1178            action="goal.cancel",
1179            resource=goal_id,
1180        )
1181        return {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "cancelled"}
1182
1183    def wait_for_goal(self, goal_id: str, timeout_seconds: float = 600, poll_interval: float = 1.0) -> dict[str, Any]:
1184        """Block until goal reaches a terminal state."""
1185        deadline = time.time() + timeout_seconds
1186        while time.time() < deadline:
1187            status = self.get_goal_status(goal_id)
1188            if status is None:
1189                return {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "not_found"}
1190            if status["status"] in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
1191                return status
1192            time.sleep(poll_interval)
1193        status = self.get_goal_status(goal_id)
1194        return status or {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "timeout"}
1195
1196    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Advanced Execution API ═══════════════════
1197
1198    def modify_plan(self, plan_id: str, operation: str, **kwargs) -> dict[str, Any]:
1199        """Dynamically modify a running plan.
1200
1201        Operations: add_task, remove_task, modify_task, add_dependency, remove_dependency
1202        """
1203        try:
1204            if operation == "add_task":
1205                if "plan_id" not in kwargs:
1206                    kwargs["plan_id"] = plan_id
1207                self._plan_modifier.add_task(**kwargs)
1208            elif operation == "remove_task":
1209                ok = self._plan_modifier.remove_task(kwargs["task_id"])
1210                if not ok:
1211                    return {"status": "failed", "reason": f"Task '{kwargs['task_id']}' not found"}
1212            elif operation == "modify_task":
1213                task_id = kwargs.pop("task_id")
1214                self._plan_modifier.modify_task(task_id, **kwargs)
1215            elif operation == "add_dependency":
1216                self._plan_modifier.add_dependency(kwargs["from_task_id"], kwargs["to_task_id"])
1217            elif operation == "remove_dependency":
1218                self._plan_modifier.remove_dependency(kwargs["from_task_id"], kwargs["to_task_id"])
1219            else:
1220                return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Unknown operation: {operation}"}
1221            self._audit("system", f"plan.{operation}", plan_id, detail=str(kwargs))
1222            return {"status": "ok", "operation": operation}
1223        except (ValueError, KeyError) as e:
1224            return {"status": "failed", "reason": str(e)}
1225        except Exception as e:
1226            return {"status": "failed", "reason": str(e)}
1227
1228    def spawn_sub_goal(
1229        self,
1230        parent_task_id: str,
1231        description: str,
1232        budget: float | None = None,
1233        required_capability: str = "code-generation.python",
1234        num_tasks: int = 1,
1235    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1236        """Spawn a sub-goal from a parent task."""
1237        sub = self._sub_goal_manager.spawn_sub_goal(
1238            parent_task_id=parent_task_id,
1239            description=description,
1240            budget=budget,
1241            required_capability=required_capability,
1242            num_tasks=num_tasks,
1243        )
1244        self._audit("system", "sub_goal.spawned", sub["sub_goal_id"], detail=description[:60])
1245        return sub
1246
1247    def get_sub_goal_status(self, sub_goal_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1248        return self._sub_goal_manager.get_sub_goal(sub_goal_id)
1249
1250    def approve_task(self, task_id: str, approver: str, comment: str = "") -> dict[str, Any]:
1251        """Approve a HITL request for a task."""
1252        pending = [r for r in self._hitl.list_pending() if r.task_id == task_id]
1253        if not pending:
1254            # Try direct request_id
1255            ok = self._hitl.approve(task_id, approver, comment)
1256            if ok:
1257                self._audit(approver, "hitl.approve", task_id, comment)
1258                return {"status": "approved"}
1259            return {"status": "not_found", "reason": "No pending approval for this task"}
1260        req = pending[0]
1261        ok = self._hitl.approve(req.request_id, approver, comment)
1262        if ok:
1263            self._audit(approver, "hitl.approve", task_id, comment)
1264            return {"status": "approved"}
1265        return {"status": "failed", "reason": "Approval rejected — approver not authorized"}
1266
1267    def reject_task(self, task_id: str, approver: str, reason: str = "") -> dict[str, Any]:
1268        """Reject a HITL request for a task."""
1269        pending = [r for r in self._hitl.list_pending() if r.task_id == task_id]
1270        if not pending:
1271            ok = self._hitl.reject(task_id, approver, reason)
1272            if ok:
1273                self._audit(approver, "hitl.reject", task_id, reason)
1274                # Try to fail the task in graph if it exists
1275                try:
1276                    if task_id in self._task_graph._tasks:
1277                        self._task_graph.transition(task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)
1278                except (ValueError, KeyError):
1279                    pass
1280                return {"status": "rejected"}
1281            return {"status": "not_found"}
1282        req = pending[0]
1283        ok = self._hitl.reject(req.request_id, approver, reason)
1284        if ok:
1285            self._audit(approver, "hitl.reject", task_id, reason)
1286            # Try to fail the associated task in graph (it may be a goal-id, not task-id)
1287            try:
1288                if task_id in self._task_graph._tasks:
1289                    self._task_graph.transition(task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)
1290            except (ValueError, KeyError):
1291                pass
1292            # Find goal by task_id pattern and cancel it
1293            for gid, goal in list(self._goals.items()):
1294                if goal["status"] not in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
1295                    if task_id.startswith(gid + "-approval"):
1296                        goal["status"] = "failed"
1297                        goal["completed_at"] = time.time()
1298                        self._audit(approver, "goal.failed", gid, detail=f"Rejected: {reason}")
1299                        break
1300            return {"status": "rejected"}
1301        return {"status": "failed", "reason": "Rejection denied — approver not authorized"}
1302
1303    def list_pending_approvals(self) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1304        """List all pending HITL approval requests."""
1305        return [
1306            {
1307                "request_id": r.request_id,
1308                "task_id": r.task_id,
1309                "description": r.description,
1310                "approvers": r.approvers,
1311                "require_all": r.require_all,
1312                "created_at": r.created_at,
1313                "status": r.status.value,
1314            }
1315            for r in self._hitl.list_pending()
1316        ]
1317
1318    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Hot Reload API ═══════════════════
1319
1320    def reload_plugin(self, plugin_id: str, new_entrypoint: str, new_version: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1321        """Hot-reload a plugin to a new version."""
1322        current = self._hot_reload_manager.get_active_version(plugin_id)
1323        if current and current.version == new_version:
1324            return {"status": "ok", "message": f"Already at version {new_version}"}
1325
1326        # Drain current version
1327        if current:
1328            self._hot_reload_manager.drain_version(plugin_id, current.version)
1329
1330        # Register new version (auto-activates as latest)
1331        self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(
1332            plugin_id, new_version, new_entrypoint, checksum=f"reload-{int(time.time())}"
1333        )
1334
1335        # Reload in plugin manager
1336        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1337            if inst.manifest.plugin_id == plugin_id:
1338                self._plugin_manager.stop_plugin(plugin_id)
1339                inst.manifest.entrypoint = new_entrypoint
1340                self._plugin_manager.start_plugin(plugin_id)
1341                break
1342
1343        self._audit("system", "plugin.reload", plugin_id, detail=f"Reloaded to {new_version} ({new_entrypoint})")
1344        return {"status": "ok", "plugin_id": plugin_id, "version": new_version}
1345
1346    def rollback_plugin(self, plugin_id: str, target_version: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1347        """Rollback a plugin to a previous version."""
1348        target = self._hot_reload_manager.get_version(plugin_id, target_version)
1349        if not target:
1350            return {"status": "failed", "reason": f"Version {target_version} not found for {plugin_id}"}
1351
1352        ok = self._hot_reload_manager.rollback(plugin_id, target_version)
1353        if ok:
1354            self._audit("system", "plugin.rollback", plugin_id, detail=f"Rolled back to {target_version}")
1355            return {"status": "ok", "plugin_id": plugin_id, "version": target_version}
1356        return {"status": "failed", "reason": "Rollback failed"}
1357
1358    def set_upgrade_strategy(self, strategy_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1359        """Change the hot reload upgrade strategy."""
1360        try:
1361            strategy = UpgradeStrategy(strategy_name)
1362        except ValueError:
1363            return {
1364                "status": "failed",
1365                "reason": f"Unknown strategy: {strategy_name}. Available: {[s.value for s in UpgradeStrategy]}",
1366            }
1367        self._hot_reload_manager.set_upgrade_strategy(strategy)
1368        return {"status": "ok", "strategy": strategy.value}
1369
1370    def get_plugin_versions(self, plugin_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1371        """Get version history for a plugin."""
1372        return [v.to_dict() for v in self._hot_reload_manager.get_versions(plugin_id)]
1373
1374    def _on_plugin_file_change(self, change_event: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
1375        """Handle file watcher events for hot reload.
1376
1377        Implements real strategy differentiation:
1378          - ROLLING: reload one at a time (simulated as instant for in-process)
1379          - BLUE_GREEN: register new version, keep old running until new is healthy
1380          - CANARY: register with canary_percent, route accordingly
1381          - INSTANT: immediate reload
1382
1383        Matches the changed file to actually registered plugins by checking
1384        if the module path contains the filename stem.
1385        """
1386        filename = change_event.get("filename", "")
1387        file_stem = filename.replace(".py", "")
1388
1389        # Find matching plugin(s) in the plugin manager — don't guess from filename
1390        matched_plugins = []
1391        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1392            entrypoint = inst.manifest.entrypoint or ""
1393            # Match if entrypoint contains the file stem (e.g. "plugins.my_plugin:v1")
1394            if file_stem in entrypoint or inst.manifest.plugin_id == file_stem:
1395                matched_plugins.append(inst.manifest.plugin_id)
1396
1397        if not matched_plugins:
1398            return  # File changed but no matching plugin — safe no-op
1399
1400        strategy = self._hot_reload_manager.upgrade_strategy
1401        timestamp = int(time.time())
1402
1403        for plugin_id in matched_plugins:
1404            if strategy == UpgradeStrategy.CANARY:
1405                new_ver = f"canary-{timestamp}"
1406                self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(
1407                    plugin_id, new_ver, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id), canary_percent=10
1408                )
1409                # Old version still gets 90% via _route_canary()
1410
1411            elif strategy == UpgradeStrategy.BLUE_GREEN:
1412                new_ver = f"bg-{timestamp}"
1413                self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(plugin_id, new_ver, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id))
1414                # Old version stays active — explicit cutover via reload_plugin()
1415
1416            elif strategy == UpgradeStrategy.INSTANT:
1417                new_ver = f"instant-{timestamp}"
1418                self.reload_plugin(plugin_id, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id), new_ver)
1419
1420            else:  # ROLLING (default)
1421                new_ver = f"rolling-{timestamp}"
1422                self.reload_plugin(plugin_id, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id), new_ver)
1423
1424    def _get_plugin_entrypoint(self, plugin_id: str) -> str:
1425        """Get the current entrypoint of a plugin by its ID."""
1426        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1427            if inst.manifest.plugin_id == plugin_id:
1428                return inst.manifest.entrypoint or f"plugins.{plugin_id}:unknown"
1429        return f"plugins.{plugin_id}:unknown"
1430
1431    def _route_canary(self, plugin_id: str) -> str | None:
1432        """CANARY routing: return which version to use based on canary_percent.
1433
1434        This is called before dispatching a task to a plugin. Returns the
1435        version string to use, or None to use the default active version.
1436        """
1437        versions = self._hot_reload_manager.get_versions(plugin_id)
1438        active_version = None
1439        canary_version = None
1440
1441        for v in versions:
1442            if v.status == "active" and v.canary_percent > 0:
1443                canary_version = v
1444            elif v.status == "active" and v.canary_percent == 0:
1445                active_version = v
1446
1447        if not canary_version:
1448            return None  # No canary in progress — use default
1449
1450        # Route based on canary_percent
1451        import random
1452
1453        if random.randint(1, 100) <= canary_version.canary_percent:
1454            return canary_version.version  # Route to canary
1455        return active_version.version if active_version else None  # Route to stable
1456
1457    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Security API ═══════════════════
1458
1459    def validate_api_key(self, key: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1460        """Validate an API key. Returns role info or None."""
1461        return self._api_key_manager.validate(key)
1462
1463    def generate_api_key(
1464        self, role: str, description: str = "", ttl_seconds: float | None = None, auth_context: dict | None = None
1465    ) -> str:
1466        """Generate a new API key (admin only)."""
1467        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.api_key.generate", "")
1468        if err:
1469            return ""
1470        key = self._api_key_manager.generate_key(role, description, ttl_seconds)
1471        self._audit(
1472            auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1473            "api_key.generate",
1474            role[:8],
1475            detail=f"Generated key for role '{role}' ({description})",
1476        )
1477        return key
1478
1479    def revoke_api_key(self, key: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> bool:
1480        """Revoke an API key (admin only)."""
1481        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.api_key.revoke", "")
1482        if err:
1483            return False
1484        ok = self._api_key_manager.revoke(key)
1485        if ok:
1486            self._audit(
1487                auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1488                "api_key.revoke",
1489                "",
1490                detail="Key revoked",
1491            )
1492        return ok
1493
1494    def get_audit_log(self, auth_context: dict | None = None, **filters) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1495        """Query audit log (admin/operator only)."""
1496        err = self._check_auth(auth_context or {}, "admin.audit.read", "")
1497        if err:
1498            return []
1499        events = self._audit_logger.query(**filters)
1500        return [e.to_dict() for e in events]
1501
1502    def add_role(
1503        self, name: str, permissions: list[str], description: str = "", auth_context: dict | None = None
1504    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1505        """Add a custom RBAC role."""
1506        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.role.manage", name)
1507        if err:
1508            return err
1509        self._access_control.add_role(name, permissions, description)
1510        self._audit(auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system", "role.add", name)
1511        return {"status": "ok", "role": name}
1512
1513    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Multi-tenancy API ═══════════════════
1514
1515    def register_tenant(
1516        self,
1517        tenant_id: str,
1518        name: str = "",
1519        quotas: dict | None = None,
1520        metadata: dict | None = None,
1521        auth_context: dict | None = None,
1522    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1523        """Register a new tenant."""
1524        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.tenant.manage", tenant_id)
1525        if err:
1526            return err
1527        rq = ResourceQuota(**(quotas or {}))
1528        self._tenant_manager.register_tenant(tenant_id, name, rq, metadata)
1529        self._audit(
1530            auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system", "tenant.register", tenant_id, detail=name
1531        )
1532        return {"status": "ok", "tenant_id": tenant_id}
1533
1534    def list_tenants(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1535        """List all tenants."""
1536        return [t.to_dict() for t in self._tenant_manager.list_tenants()]
1537
1538    def get_tenant_usage(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
1539        """Get usage report across all tenants."""
1540        return self._tenant_manager.get_usage_report()
1541
1542    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Distributed API ═══════════════════
1543
1544    def is_leader(self) -> bool:
1545        """Check if this node is the cluster leader."""
1546        return self._leader_election.is_leader()
1547
1548    def get_cluster_status(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
1549        """Get cluster-wide status."""
1550        status = self._node_registry.cluster_status()
1551        status["this_node"] = self._node_id
1552        status["is_leader"] = self._leader_election.is_leader()
1553        status["leader_id"] = self._leader_election.get_leader_id()
1554        return status
1555
1556    def get_work_queue_depth(self) -> int:
1557        """Get local work queue depth."""
1558        return self._work_stealing.queue_size()
1559
1560    # ═══════════════════ Admin ═══════════════════
1561
1562    def get_health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
1563        agent_count = len(self._execution_engine.list_agents())
1564        connected = sum(1 for a in self._execution_engine.list_agents() if a.status == "heartbeating")
1565        plugin_statuses = {}
1566        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1567            plugin_statuses[inst.manifest.plugin_id] = inst.status.value if inst.status else "unknown"
1568
1569        # Phase 3 additions
1570        audit_count = self._audit_logger.total_events()
1571        tenant_count = self._tenant_manager.tenant_count()
1572        pending_approvals = self._hitl.get_pending_count()
1573
1574        return {
1575            "status": "healthy" if self._running else "degraded",
1576            "uptime_seconds": time.time() - self._started_at if self._started_at > 0 else 0,
1577            "components": {
1578                "kernel": "healthy" if self._running else "degraded",
1579                "plugins": {
1580                    "total": len(plugin_statuses),
1581                    "healthy": sum(1 for s in plugin_statuses.values() if s == "RUNNING"),
1582                    "degraded": sum(1 for s in plugin_statuses.values() if s == "ERROR"),
1583                    "error": sum(1 for s in plugin_statuses.values() if s == "ERROR"),
1584                },
1585                "agents": {"total": agent_count, "connected": connected, "disconnected": agent_count - connected},
1586                "security": {"audit_events": audit_count, "mTLS_configured": self._tls_config.is_configured()},
1587                "multi_tenancy": {"tenants": tenant_count},
1588                "hitl": {"pending_approvals": pending_approvals},
1589                "cluster": {"enabled": self._cluster_enabled, "is_leader": self._leader_election.is_leader()},
1590            },
1591            "version": "0.7.0",
1592        }
1593
1594    def get_metrics(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
1595        tasks = self._task_graph.list_tasks()
1596        return {
1597            "goals": {
1598                "active": sum(
1599                    1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] not in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled")
1600                ),
1601                "completed_total": sum(1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] == "completed"),
1602                "failed_total": sum(1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] == "failed"),
1603                "cancelled_total": sum(1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] == "cancelled"),
1604            },
1605            "tasks": {
1606                "in_flight": self._execution_engine.in_flight_count,
1607                "completed_total": sum(1 for t in tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED),
1608                "failed_total": sum(1 for t in tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.FAILED),
1609                "timed_out_total": sum(1 for t in tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.TIMED_OUT),
1610                "avg_completion_ms": 0,
1611            },
1612            "agents": {
1613                "registered": len(self._execution_engine.list_agents()),
1614                "connected": sum(1 for a in self._execution_engine.list_agents() if a.status == "heartbeating"),
1615                "avg_success_rate": 0.9,
1616                "total_tasks_dispatched": 0,
1617            },
1618            "events": {"published_total": self._event_bus.total_events(), "events_per_second": 0},
1619            # Phase 3
1620            "security": {
1621                "audit_events": self._audit_logger.total_events(),
1622                "active_api_keys": len(self._api_key_manager.list_keys()),
1623            },
1624            "multi_tenancy": {
1625                "tenants": self._tenant_manager.tenant_count(),
1626                "usage": self._tenant_manager.get_usage_report(),
1627            },
1628            "hitl": {"pending_approvals": self._hitl.get_pending_count()},
1629            "hot_reload": {"plugins_tracked": len(self._hot_reload_manager.list_plugins())},
1630            "cluster": {
1631                "enabled": self._cluster_enabled,
1632                "nodes": self._node_registry.node_count() if self._cluster_enabled else 0,
1633                "is_leader": self._leader_election.is_leader(),
1634            },
1635        }
class ZelosRuntime: 
  39class ZelosRuntime:
  40    """Central entry point. Owns Kernel lifecycle and Agent lifecycle.
  41
  42    Supports:
  43      - Dict config: ZelosRuntime({"plugins": [...]})
  44      - YAML file:  ZelosRuntime.from_yaml("zelos.yaml")
  45
  46    Phase 3: Integrated security (RBAC + audit), multi-tenancy (quotas + isolation),
  47    advanced execution (dynamic plans + sub-goals + HITL), hot reload (strategies),
  48    and distributed coordination (leader election + work stealing).
  49    """
  50
  51    def __init__(self, config: dict[str, Any] | None = None):
  52        self.config = config or {}
  53
  54        # ── Phase 1 & 2: Kernel ──
  55        self._event_bus = EventBus()
  56        self._capability_registry = CapabilityRegistry()
  57        self._task_graph = TaskGraphEngine()
  58        self._plugin_manager = PluginLifecycleManager()
  59        self._scoring_strategy: ScoringStrategy | None = None
  60        self._policy_plugin: PolicyPlugin | None = None
  61        self._policy_engine: CompositePolicy | None = None
  62        self._planner: LLMPlanner | None = None
  63        self._verifier_gate: VerificationGate | None = None
  64        self._memory_provider: InMemoryMemoryProvider | None = None
  65        self._context_assembler: ContextAssembler | None = None
  66        self._scheduler: Scheduler | None = None
  67        self._execution_engine = ExecutionEngine(self._task_graph, self._event_bus)
  68        self._goals: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
  69        self._agents: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}  # name → {agent info}
  70        self._agent_instances: dict[str, Any] = {}  # name → agent object
  71        self._agent_threads: dict[str, threading.Thread] = {}
  72        self._orchestrator_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
  73        self._running = False
  74        self._lock = threading.RLock()
  75        self._started_at: float = 0.0
  76
  77        # ── Phase 3: Security ──
  78        sec_cfg = self.config.get("security", {})
  79        self._access_control = AccessControl()
  80        self._audit_logger = AuditLogger(max_events=sec_cfg.get("audit_max_events", 100000))
  81        self._api_key_manager = APIKeyManager()
  82        self._tls_config = TLSConfig(
  83            cert_file=sec_cfg.get("cert_file", ""),
  84            key_file=sec_cfg.get("key_file", ""),
  85            ca_file=sec_cfg.get("ca_file", ""),
  86            require_client_cert=sec_cfg.get("require_client_cert", True),
  87            min_tls_version=sec_cfg.get("min_tls_version", "TLSv1.2"),
  88            verify_hostname=sec_cfg.get("verify_hostname", True),
  89        )
  90
