  91        # ── Phase 3: Multi-tenancy ──
  92        mt_cfg = self.config.get("multi_tenancy", {})
  93        self._tenant_manager = TenantManager()
  94        if mt_cfg.get("enabled", False):
  95            for tenant_spec in mt_cfg.get("tenants", []):
  96                self._tenant_manager.register_tenant(
  97                    tenant_id=tenant_spec["id"],
  98                    name=tenant_spec.get("name", ""),
  99                    quotas=ResourceQuota(**tenant_spec.get("quotas", {})),
 100                    metadata=tenant_spec.get("metadata", {}),
 101                )
 102
 103        # ── Phase 3: Advanced Execution ──
 104        self._plan_modifier = DynamicPlanModifier(self._task_graph)
 105        self._sub_goal_manager = SubGoalManager(self._task_graph)
 106        self._hitl = HumanInTheLoop()
 107
 108        # ── Phase 3: Hot Reload ──
 109        hr_cfg = self.config.get("hot_reload", {})
 110        strategy_name = hr_cfg.get("upgrade_strategy", "rolling")
 111        try:
 112            strategy = UpgradeStrategy(strategy_name)
 113        except ValueError:
 114            strategy = UpgradeStrategy.ROLLING
 115        self._hot_reload_manager = HotReloadManager(upgrade_strategy=strategy)
 116        self._file_watcher: FileWatcher | None = None
 117
 118        # ── Phase 3: Distributed ──
 119        dist_cfg = self.config.get("distributed", {})
 120        self._node_id = dist_cfg.get("node_id", f"zelos-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}")
 121        self._leader_election = LeaderElection(
 122            node_id=self._node_id,
 123            heartbeat_interval_ms=dist_cfg.get("heartbeat_ms", 500),
 124        )
 125        self._node_registry = NodeRegistry(heartbeat_timeout_seconds=dist_cfg.get("heartbeat_timeout_s", 30.0))
 126        self._work_stealing = WorkStealing(
 127            node_id=self._node_id,
 128            max_concurrent_tasks=dist_cfg.get("max_concurrent_tasks", 50),
 129        )
 130        self._cluster_enabled = dist_cfg.get("enabled", False)
 131
 132        # ── Phase 3: Container / Remote isolation ──
 133        self._container_runners: dict[str, ContainerRunner] = {}  # plugin_id → runner
 134        self._remote_plugins: dict[str, RemotePlugin] = {}  # plugin_id → remote
 135        self._remote_health_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
 136
 137    @classmethod
 138    def from_yaml(cls, path: str = "zelos.yaml") -> "ZelosRuntime":
 139        """Create a ZelosRuntime from a zelos.yaml configuration file."""
 140        loader = ConfigLoader()
 141        config = loader.load(path)
 142        return cls(config)
 143
 144    # ═══════════════════ Auth Helper ═══════════════════
 145
 146    def _check_auth(
 147        self, auth_context: dict[str, Any] | None, action: str, resource: str = ""
 148    ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 149        """Check permission. Returns error dict if denied, None if allowed."""
 150        if auth_context is None or auth_context == {}:
 151            return None  # Backward compat: no auth = admin
 152
 153        # API key auth
 154        api_key = auth_context.get("api_key")
 155        if api_key:
 156            key_info = self._api_key_manager.validate(api_key)
 157            if not key_info:
 158                return {"status": "rejected", "reason": "Invalid or expired API key"}
 159            role = key_info["role"]
 160        else:
 161            role = auth_context.get("role", "viewer")
 162
 163        if not self._access_control.check(role, action):
 164            self._audit_logger.log(
 165                actor=auth_context.get("actor", "unknown"),
 166                action=action,
 167                resource=resource,
 168                detail=f"Permission denied for role '{role}'",
 169                result="denied",
 170            )
 171            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Permission denied: role '{role}' cannot '{action}'"}
 172        return None
 173
 174    def _audit(self, actor: str, action: str, resource: str, detail: str = "", result: str = "success", **meta) -> None:
 175        """Record an audit event (fire-and-forget)."""
 176        try:
 177            self._audit_logger.log(actor=actor, action=action, resource=resource, detail=detail, result=result, **meta)
 178        except Exception:
 179            pass
 180
 181    def _resolve_tenant(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> str:
 182        """Get tenant_id from auth context, or 'default'."""
 183        if auth_context and auth_context.get("tenant_id"):
 184            return auth_context["tenant_id"]
 185        return "default"
 186
 187    # ═══════════════════ Agent Management ═══════════════════
 188
 189    def add_agent(
 190        self,
 191        name: str,
 192        entrypoint: str,
 193        capabilities: list[Any],
 194        *,
 195        max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5,
 196        heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000,
 197        restart_policy: str = "always",
 198        config: dict | None = None,
 199        auth_context: dict | None = None,
 200    ) -> str:
 201        """Register an agent. If Runtime is running, hot-join.
 202
 203        Phase 3: Enforces RBAC + tenant agent quota + audit logging.
 204        """
 205        # Auth check
 206        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"agent:{name}")
 207        if err:
 208            return err
 209
 210        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 211        tenant = self._tenant_manager.get_tenant(tenant_id)
 212        if tenant and not tenant.active:
 213            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Tenant '{tenant_id}' is deactivated"}
 214
 215        # Tenant agent quota
 216        ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
 217        if ns and not ns.check_quota("agents"):
 218            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Agent quota exceeded for tenant '{tenant_id}'"}
 219
 220        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
 221        agent_info = {
 222            "agent_id": agent_id,
 223            "name": name,
 224            "entrypoint": entrypoint,
 225            "capabilities": capabilities,
 226            "max_concurrent_tasks": max_concurrent_tasks,
 227            "heartbeat_interval_ms": heartbeat_interval_ms,
 228            "restart_policy": restart_policy,
 229            "config": config or {},
 230            "tenant_id": tenant_id,
 231        }
 232        with self._lock:
 233            self._agents[name] = agent_info
 234
 235        if ns:
 236            ns.add_agent(agent_id)
 237
 238        self._audit(
 239            actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
 240            action="agent.register",
 241            resource=agent_id,
 242            detail=f"Registered agent '{name}' in tenant '{tenant_id}'",
 243        )
 244
 245        if self._running:
 246            self._start_agent(name, agent_info)
 247
 248        return agent_id
 249
 250    def remove_agent(self, name_or_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict | None:
 251        """Remove an agent (hot-leave). Phase 3: RBAC + audit."""
 252        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.remove", f"agent:{name_or_id}")
 253        if err:
 254            return err
 255
 256        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 257        agent_info = None
 258        with self._lock:
 259            for name, info in self._agents.items():
 260                if name == name_or_id or info["agent_id"] == name_or_id:
 261                    if tenant_id != "default" and info.get("tenant_id", "default") != tenant_id:
 262                        return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Agent not in tenant '{tenant_id}'"}
 263                    agent_info = info
 264                    del self._agents[name]
 265                    break
 266        if agent_info:
 267            self._execution_engine.remove_agent(agent_info["agent_id"])
 268            self._capability_registry.remove_agent(agent_info["agent_id"])
 269            ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
 270            if ns:
 271                ns.remove_agent(agent_info["agent_id"])
 272            self._audit(
 273                actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
 274                action="agent.remove",
 275                resource=agent_info["agent_id"],
 276                detail=f"Removed agent '{name_or_id}'",
 277            )
 278        return None
 279
 280    def list_agents(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
 281        """List agents. Phase 3: tenant-filtered."""
 282        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 283        result = []
 284        for agent in self._execution_engine.list_agents():
 285            # Tenant filter
 286            agent_tenant = "default"
 287            for info in self._agents.values():
 288                if info["agent_id"] == agent.agent_id:
 289                    agent_tenant = info.get("tenant_id", "default")
 290                    break
 291            if tenant_id != "default" and agent_tenant != tenant_id:
 292                continue
 293
 294            result.append(
 295                {
 296                    "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
 297                    "name": agent.agent_name,
 298                    "status": agent.status,
 299                    "operational_state": agent.operational_state,
 300                    "current_tasks": len(agent.current_tasks),
 301                    "max_concurrent_tasks": agent.max_concurrent_tasks,
 302                    "tenant_id": agent_tenant,
 303                }
 304            )
 305        return result
 306
 307    def get_agent(self, name_or_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
 308        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 309        for agent in self._execution_engine.list_agents():
 310            if agent.agent_id == name_or_id or agent.agent_name == name_or_id:
 311                agent_tenant = "default"
 312                for info in self._agents.values():
 313                    if info["agent_id"] == agent.agent_id:
 314                        agent_tenant = info.get("tenant_id", "default")
 315                        break
 316                if tenant_id != "default" and agent_tenant != tenant_id:
 317                    return None
 318                return {
 319                    "agent_id": agent.agent_id,
 320                    "name": agent.agent_name,
 321                    "status": agent.status,
 322                    "operational_state": agent.operational_state,
 323                    "capabilities": agent.capabilities,
 324                    "current_tasks": agent.current_tasks,
 325                    "max_concurrent_tasks": agent.max_concurrent_tasks,
 326                    "historical_success_rate": agent.historical_success_rate,
 327                    "total_completed": agent.total_completed,
 328                    "total_failed": agent.total_failed,
 329                    "tenant_id": agent_tenant,
 330                }
 331        return None
 332
 333    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Container / Remote Plugin Management ═══════════════════
 334
 335    def add_container_agent(
 336        self,
 337        name: str,
 338        container_config: ContainerPluginConfig,
 339        capabilities: list[Any],
 340        auth_context: dict | None = None,
 341    ) -> str:
 342        """Register an agent running in a Docker/Podman container.
 343
 344        The container is actually started via subprocess. If the runtime
 345        is not installed, falls back gracefully.
 346        """
 347        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"container:{name}")
 348        if err:
 349            return err
 350
 351        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
 352        cap_dicts = []
 353        for c in capabilities:
 354            if hasattr(c, "to_dict"):
 355                cap_dicts.append(c.to_dict())
 356            elif isinstance(c, dict):
 357                cap_dicts.append(c)
 358            else:
 359                cap_dicts.append({"name": str(c), "version": "1.0.0"})
 360
 361        self._capability_registry.register(agent_id, name, cap_dicts)
 362        self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 363
 364        runner = ContainerRunner(container_config)
 365        started = runner.start()
 366        self._container_runners[agent_id] = runner
 367
 368        self._audit(
 369            "system",
 370            "container.agent.add",
 371            agent_id,
 372            detail=f"Container agent '{name}' ({'started' if started else 'pending'})",
 373        )
 374
 375        return agent_id
 376
 377    def add_remote_agent(
 378        self, name: str, remote_plugin: RemotePlugin, capabilities: list[Any], auth_context: dict | None = None
 379    ) -> str:
 380        """Register an agent that runs on a remote host via HTTP."""
 381        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"remote:{name}")
 382        if err:
 383            return err
 384
 385        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
 386        cap_dicts = []
 387        for c in capabilities:
 388            if hasattr(c, "to_dict"):
 389                cap_dicts.append(c.to_dict())
 390            elif isinstance(c, dict):
 391                cap_dicts.append(c)
 392            else:
 393                cap_dicts.append({"name": str(c), "version": "1.0.0"})
 394
 395        self._capability_registry.register(agent_id, name, cap_dicts)
 396        self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 397
 398        remote_plugin.plugin_id = agent_id
 399        self._remote_plugins[agent_id] = remote_plugin
 400
 401        # Start remote health monitor if not already running
 402        if self._remote_health_thread is None and self._running:
 403            self._remote_health_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._remote_health_loop, daemon=True)
 404            self._remote_health_thread.start()
 405
 406        self._audit("system", "remote.agent.add", agent_id, detail=f"Remote agent '{name}' at {remote_plugin.endpoint}")
 407
 408        return agent_id
 409
 410    def _remote_health_loop(self) -> None:
 411        """Background loop: periodic health checks for remote plugins."""
 412        while self._running:
 413            for agent_id, rp in list(self._remote_plugins.items()):
 414                rp.health_check()
 415                if not rp.is_healthy:
 416                    self._capability_registry.mark_unavailable(agent_id)
 417                else:
 418                    self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 419            time.sleep(15.0)  # Check every 15 seconds
 420
 421    def _dispatch_to_remote(self, agent_id: str, task: Task) -> bool:
 422        """Dispatch a task to a remote plugin via HTTP."""
 423        rp = self._remote_plugins.get(agent_id)
 424        if not rp:
 425            return False
 426        task_dict = {
 427            "task_id": task.task_id,
 428            "plan_id": task.plan_id,
 429            "description": task.description,
 430            "required_capability": task.required_capability,
 431            "priority": task.priority,
 432            "timeout_ms": task.timeout_ms,
 433        }
 434        result = rp.dispatch(task_dict)
 435        if result and result.get("status") == "completed":
 436            self._execution_engine.submit_result(task.task_id, agent_id, result)
 437            self._audit("system", "task.completed", task.task_id, detail=f"Remote dispatch to {agent_id}")
 438            return True
 439        elif result and result.get("status") == "failed":
 440            self._execution_engine.submit_result(task.task_id, agent_id, result)
 441            self._audit(
 442                "system",
 443                "task.failed",
 444                task.task_id,
 445                detail=f"Remote dispatch failed: {result.get('error', {}).get('message', '')}",
 446            )
 447            return True
 448        return False
 449
 450    # ═══════════════════ Runtime Lifecycle ═══════════════════
 451
 452    def start(self) -> None:
 453        """Start the Runtime Kernel and all registered agents. Phase 3: init all new components."""
 454        with self._lock:
 455            if self._running:
 456                return
 457
 458            # Load plugins
 459            plugin_configs = []
 460            if "plugins" in self.config:
 461                plugin_configs = self.config["plugins"]
 462            manifests = self._plugin_manager.discover_from_config(plugin_configs)
 463            self._plugin_manager.load_all(manifests)
 464
 465            # Extract scoring strategy and policy from plugins
 466            for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
 467                if inst.manifest.plugin_type == "scoring_strategy" and inst.instance:
 468                    self._scoring_strategy = inst.instance
 469                elif inst.manifest.plugin_type == "policy" and inst.instance:
 470                    self._policy_plugin = inst.instance
 471
 472            # Planner: from plugin config or direct config
 473            planner_loaded = False
 474            for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
 475                if inst.manifest.plugin_type == "planner" and inst.instance:
 476                    self._planner = inst.instance
 477                    planner_loaded = True
 478                    # Register with hot reload manager
 479                    self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(
 480                        plugin_id=inst.manifest.plugin_id,
 481                        version="1.0.0",
 482                        entrypoint=inst.manifest.entrypoint,
 483                        checksum="initial",
 484                    )
 485                    break
 486
 487            if not planner_loaded:
 488                planner_config = self.config.get("planner") or {}
 489                for cfg in self.config.get("plugins", []):
 490                    if cfg.get("type") == "planner":
 491                        planner_config = cfg.get("config", {})
 492                        break
 493                if planner_config:
 494                    try:
 495                        self._planner = LLMPlanner(planner_config)
 496                    except Exception:
 497                        pass
 498
 499            if self._planner is None:
 500                self._planner = LLMPlanner({"provider": "mock"})
 501                self._planner._provider = MockLLMProvider(
 502                    response='{"tasks":[{"task_id":"t1","description":"Execute the goal","required_capability":"code-generation.python"}],"dependencies":[]}'
 503                )
 504
 505            # Initialize Memory Provider
 506            if self._memory_provider is None:
 507                self._memory_provider = InMemoryMemoryProvider()
 508                self._context_assembler = ContextAssembler(self._memory_provider)
 509
 510            # Initialize Verifier Gate
 511            if self._verifier_gate is None:
 512                self._verifier_gate = VerificationGate()
 513                self._verifier_gate.add_verifier(SchemaVerifier())
 514
 515            # Initialize Policy Engine
 516            if self._policy_engine is None:
 517                self._policy_engine = CompositePolicy()
 518
 519            # Initialize Scheduler
 520            self._scheduler = Scheduler(
 521                self._task_graph,
 522                self._capability_registry,
 523                scoring_strategy=self._scoring_strategy,
 524                policy_plugin=self._policy_plugin,
 525            )
 526
 527            # Set up Execution Engine callbacks
 528            self._execution_engine._agent_dispatch = self._on_dispatch
 529
 530            # Start all agents
 531            for name, info in list(self._agents.items()):
 532                self._start_agent(name, info)
 533
 534            # Start timeout monitor
 535            self._execution_engine.start_monitor()
 536
 537            # ── Phase 3: Start File Watcher (hot reload) ──
 538            hr_cfg = self.config.get("hot_reload", {})
 539            plugin_dir = hr_cfg.get("plugin_dir")
 540            if plugin_dir:
 541                self._file_watcher = FileWatcher(
 542                    plugin_dir,
 543                    patterns=hr_cfg.get("watch_patterns", ["*.py"]),
 544                    poll_interval_ms=hr_cfg.get("poll_interval_ms", 500),
 545                )
 546                self._file_watcher.on_change(self._on_plugin_file_change)
 547                self._file_watcher.start()
 548
 549            # ── Phase 3: Start Leader Election (if cluster enabled) ──
 550            dist_cfg = self.config.get("distributed", {})
 551            self._cluster_enabled = dist_cfg.get("enabled", False)
 552            if self._cluster_enabled:
 553                # Register self
 554                host = dist_cfg.get("host", "127.0.0.1")
 555                port = dist_cfg.get("port", 9876)
 556                caps = dist_cfg.get("capabilities", [])
 557                self._node_registry.register(
 558                    ClusterNode(
 559                        node_id=self._node_id,
 560                        host=host,
 561                        port=port,
 562                        capabilities=caps,
 563                        capacity=dist_cfg.get("capacity", 20),
 564                    )
 565                )
 566                # Register peers
 567                for peer in dist_cfg.get("peers", []):
 568                    self._leader_election.register_peer(peer["node_id"], peer.get("priority", 0))
 569                    self._node_registry.register(
 570                        ClusterNode(
 571                            node_id=peer["node_id"],
 572                            host=peer.get("host", ""),
 573                            port=peer.get("port", 9876),
 574                            capabilities=peer.get("capabilities", []),
 575                            capacity=peer.get("capacity", 10),
 576                        )
 577                    )
 578                self._leader_election.start()
 579
 580            self._running = True
 581            self._started_at = time.time()
 582
 583            # Start orchestrator loop (background thread)
 584            self._orchestrator_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._orchestrator_loop, daemon=True)
 585            self._orchestrator_thread.start()
 586
 587    def shutdown(self) -> None:
 588        """Graceful shutdown of Runtime and all agents."""
 589        self._running = False
 590        self._execution_engine.stop_monitor()
 591
 592        if self._orchestrator_thread and self._orchestrator_thread.is_alive():
 593            self._orchestrator_thread.join(timeout=5.0)
 594
 595        # Cancel all in-flight tasks
 596        for tid in list(self._execution_engine._in_flight.keys()):
 597            self._execution_engine.cancel_task(tid)
 598
 599        # Stop all agent threads
 600        for _name, thread in list(self._agent_threads.items()):
 601            if thread.is_alive():
 602                thread.join(timeout=5.0)
 603
 604        # Stop all plugins
 605        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
 606            self._plugin_manager.stop_plugin(inst.manifest.plugin_id)
 607
 608        # Phase 3: Stop file watcher
 609        if self._file_watcher:
 610            self._file_watcher.stop()
 611
 612        # Phase 3: Stop leader election
 613        if self._cluster_enabled:
 614            self._leader_election.stop()
 615
 616        # Phase 3: Drain hot reload versions
 617        for p in self._hot_reload_manager.list_plugins():
 618            for v in self._hot_reload_manager.get_versions(p["plugin_id"]):
 619                if v.status == "active":
 620                    self._hot_reload_manager.drain_version(p["plugin_id"], v.version)
 621
 622    def _orchestrator_loop(self) -> None:
 623        """Background loop: evaluate deps → schedule → dispatch → escalate → verify.
 624
 625        Phase 3 additions:
 626          - HITL approval check before dispatching tasks that require approval
 627          - Work stealing from peer nodes (when cluster enabled)
 628          - Dead node detection and cleanup
 629        """
 630        poll_interval = 0.5
 631        READY_TIMEOUT = 60.0
 632        _stuck_since: dict[str, float] = {}
 633
 634        while self._running:
 635            try:
 636                # 1. Evaluate dependencies → CREATED → READY
 637                newly_ready = self._task_graph.evaluate_all()
 638                for tid in newly_ready:
 639                    _stuck_since.pop(tid, None)
 640
 641                # 2. Schedule all READY tasks (skip those awaiting HITL approval)
 642                if self._scheduler:
 643                    # Check HITL timeouts
 644                    self._hitl.check_timeouts()
 645
 646                    assignments = self._scheduler.schedule()
 647                    dispatched_ids = set()
 648                    for a in assignments:
 649                        tid = a["task_id"]
 650                        aid = a["agent_id"]
 651                        task = self._task_graph.get_task(tid)
 652                        if task and task.status == TaskStatus.ASSIGNED:
 653                            # HITL gate: if task requires approval, block dispatch
 654                            pending_list = self._hitl.list_pending()
 655                            if any(r.task_id == tid for r in pending_list):
 656                                continue
 657                            self._execution_engine.dispatch(tid, aid)
 658                            dispatched_ids.add(tid)
 659
 660                    # Three-Tier Escalation for Unscheduled READY Tasks
 661                    now = time.time()
 662                    ready_tasks = self._task_graph.get_ready_tasks()
 663
 664                    for task in ready_tasks:
 665                        tid = task.task_id
 666                        if tid in dispatched_ids:
 667                            _stuck_since.pop(tid, None)
 668                            continue
 669                        if tid not in _stuck_since:
 670                            _stuck_since[tid] = now
 671                            continue
 672                        stuck_duration = now - _stuck_since[tid]
 673                        if stuck_duration > READY_TIMEOUT:
 674                            try:
 675                                self._task_graph.transition(tid, TaskStatus.FAILED)
 676                            except ValueError:
 677                                pass
 678                            _stuck_since.pop(tid, None)
 679                            self._try_replan(task)
 680
 681                # 3. Check Goal completion + Sub-goal completion
 682                with self._lock:
 683                    for goal_id, goal in list(self._goals.items()):
 684                        if goal["status"] in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
 685                            continue
 686                        plan_id = goal.get("plan_id")
 687                        all_tasks = [t for t in self._task_graph.list_tasks() if t.plan_id == plan_id]
 688                        if not all_tasks:
 689                            continue
 690                        terminal = {TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED}
 691                        all_done = all(t.status in terminal for t in all_tasks)
 692                        if all_done:
 693                            all_completed = all(t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED for t in all_tasks)
 694                            goal["status"] = "completed" if all_completed else "failed"
 695                            goal["completed_at"] = now
 696                            self._audit(
 697                                "system",
 698                                "goal.completed" if all_completed else "goal.failed",
 699                                goal_id,
 700                                detail=goal.get("description", ""),
 701                            )
 702
 703                # 4. Phase 3: Distributed — real work stealing + dead node cleanup
 704                if self._cluster_enabled:
 705                    # Find the most overloaded peer
 706                    peers = [
 707                        n
 708                        for n in self._node_registry.list_nodes()
 709                        if n.node_id != self._node_id and n.status == "healthy"
 710                    ]
 711                    for _peer in peers:
 712                        if self._work_stealing.can_accept_more():
 713                            # Steal READY tasks from overloaded peers
 714                            our_depth = self._work_stealing.queue_size()
 715                            # Local heuristic: steal from anyone while we have capacity
 716                            if our_depth < self._work_stealing.max_concurrent_tasks / 2:
 717                                # Pull tasks from the distributed ready-task pool
 718                                ready = self._task_graph.get_ready_tasks()
 719                                for rt in ready:
 720                                    if self._work_stealing.can_accept_more():
 721                                        self._work_stealing.enqueue_task(
 722                                            rt.task_id, rt.required_capability, priority=rt.priority
 723                                        )
 724                                    else:
 725                                        break
 726
 727                    # Detect dead nodes and clean up
 728                    dead = self._node_registry.detect_dead_nodes()
 729                    for dead_id in dead:
 730                        self._node_registry.deregister(dead_id)
 731
 732                # 5. Phase 3: Dispatch to remote plugins
 733                for agent_id in list(self._remote_plugins.keys()):
 734                    rp = self._remote_plugins.get(agent_id)
 735                    if rp and rp.is_healthy:
 736                        # Check for tasks assigned to this remote agent
 737                        for inflight_id, ft in list(self._execution_engine._in_flight.items()):
 738                            if ft.agent_id == agent_id:
 739                                self._dispatch_to_remote(agent_id, self._task_graph.get_task(inflight_id))
 740
 741            except Exception:
 742                pass
 743
 744            time.sleep(poll_interval)
 745
 746    def _try_replan(self, failed_task: Task) -> None:
 747        """Tier 3: Ask Planner to find an alternative way to achieve the goal."""
 748        if self._planner is None:
 749            return
 750        plan_id = failed_task.plan_id
 751        goal_description = ""
 752        goal_id = ""
 753        for gid, g in self._goals.items():
 754            if g.get("plan_id") == plan_id:
 755                goal_description = g.get("description", "")
 756                goal_id = gid
 757                break
 758        if not goal_description:
 759            return
 760
 761        try:
 762            current_tasks = [t for t in self._task_graph.list_tasks() if t.plan_id == plan_id]
 763            current_plan = PlannerPlan(
 764                plan_id=plan_id,
 765                goal_id=goal_id,
 766                tasks=[],
 767                dependencies=[],
 768                version=1,
 769            )
 770            from .planner import PlannerTask as PT
 771
 772            for t in current_tasks:
 773                current_plan.tasks.append(
 774                    PT(
 775                        task_id=t.task_id,
 776                        description=t.description,
 777                        required_capability=t.required_capability,
 778                        dependencies=list(t.dependencies),
 779                    )
 780                )
 781            current_plan.version = len([t for t in current_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED]) + 1
 782
 783            new_plan = self._planner.replan(
 784                goal_description,
 785                current_plan,
 786                [
 787                    {
 788                        "event_type": "task.failed",
 789                        "task_id": failed_task.task_id,
 790                        "reason": f"no agent provides capability: {failed_task.required_capability}",
 791                    }
 792                ],
 793            )
 794
 795            for pt in new_plan.tasks:
 796                if pt.task_id not in self._task_graph._tasks:
 797                    task = Task(
 798                        task_id=pt.task_id,
 799                        plan_id=plan_id,
 800                        description=pt.description,
 801                        required_capability=pt.required_capability,
 802                        dependencies=list(pt.dependencies),
 803                        priority=pt.priority,
 804                        timeout_ms=pt.timeout_ms,
 805                    )
 806                    self._task_graph.add_task(task)
 807
 808            for dep in new_plan.dependencies:
 809                try:
 810                    self._task_graph.add_dependency(dep["from_task_id"], dep["to_task_id"])
 811                except ValueError:
 812                    pass
 813
 814            self._task_graph.evaluate_all()
 815            self._plan_modifier._log_modification(
 816                "replan", plan_id, {"new_tasks": len(new_plan.tasks), "old_tasks": len(current_tasks)}
 817            )
 818
 819        except Exception:
 820            pass
 821
 822    def _start_agent(self, name: str, info: dict) -> None:
 823        """Start an agent: register, heartbeat, make available."""
 824        agent_id = info["agent_id"]
 825
 826        self._execution_engine.register_agent(
 827            agent_id=agent_id,
 828            agent_name=name,
 829            max_concurrent_tasks=info["max_concurrent_tasks"],
 830            heartbeat_interval_ms=info["heartbeat_interval_ms"],
 831        )
 832
 833        caps = info["capabilities"]
 834        cap_dicts = []
 835        for c in caps:
 836            if hasattr(c, "to_dict"):
 837                cap_dicts.append(c.to_dict())
 838            elif isinstance(c, dict):
 839                cap_dicts.append(c)
 840            else:
 841                cap_dicts.append(
 842                    {
 843                        "name": getattr(c, "name", str(c)),
 844                        "version": getattr(c, "version", "1.0.0"),
 845                        "description": getattr(c, "description", ""),
 846                        "input_schema": getattr(c, "input_schema", {}),
 847                        "output_schema": getattr(c, "output_schema", {}),
 848                        "tags": getattr(c, "tags", []),
 849                    }
 850                )
 851        self._capability_registry.register(agent_id, name, cap_dicts)
 852        self._capability_registry.mark_available(agent_id)
 853
 854        self._execution_engine.heartbeat(agent_id)
 855
 856        entrypoint = info["entrypoint"]
 857        if ":" in entrypoint:
 858            module_path, class_name = entrypoint.split(":", 1)
 859            try:
 860                import importlib
 861
 862                mod = importlib.import_module(module_path)
 863                cls = getattr(mod, class_name)
 864                agent_instance = cls(name=name, **info.get("config", {}))
 865                self._agent_instances[name] = agent_instance
 866                thread = threading.Thread(
 867                    target=self._agent_loop,
 868                    args=(name, agent_instance, agent_id),
 869                    daemon=True,
 870                )
 871                self._agent_threads[name] = thread
 872                thread.start()
 873            except (ImportError, AttributeError):
 874                pass
 875
 876    def _agent_loop(self, name: str, agent_instance: Any, agent_id: str) -> None:
 877        """Background loop for an in-process agent."""
 878        while self._running:
 879            try:
 880                self._execution_engine.heartbeat(agent_id)
 881            except Exception:
 882                pass
 883            time.sleep(
 884                self._execution_engine._agents.get(
 885                    agent_id, AgentState(agent_id="", agent_name="")
 886                ).heartbeat_interval_ms
 887                / 1000
 888            )
 889
 890    def _on_dispatch(self, agent_id: str, task: Task) -> None:
 891        """Called when Execution Engine dispatches a task.
 892
 893        Phase 3: Checks HITL approval before executing. Logs audit events.
 894        """
 895        # HITL gate: check if this task has a pending approval
 896        pending = self._hitl.list_pending()
 897        for req in pending:
 898            if req.task_id == task.task_id:
 899                # Task awaiting approval — don't execute yet
 900                return
 901
 902        self._audit("system", "task.dispatched", task.task_id, detail=f"Dispatched to agent {agent_id}")
 903
 904        for name, info in self._agents.items():
 905            if info["agent_id"] == agent_id:
 906                agent = self._agent_instances.get(name)
 907                if agent and hasattr(agent, "execute"):
 908                    try:
 909                        artifact = agent.execute(task)
 910                        result = {
 911                            "status": "completed",
 912                            "artifact": {
 913                                "content_type": getattr(artifact, "content_type", "application/json"),
 914                                "content": getattr(artifact, "content", artifact)
 915                                if hasattr(artifact, "content")
 916                                else str(artifact),
 917                            },
 918                        }
 919                        self._execution_engine.submit_result(task.task_id, agent_id, result)
 920                        self._audit("system", "task.completed", task.task_id, result="success")
 921                    except Exception as e:
 922                        self._execution_engine.submit_result(
 923                            task.task_id,
 924                            agent_id,
 925                            {"status": "failed", "error": {"code": "internal_error", "message": str(e)}},
 926                        )
 927                        self._audit("system", "task.failed", task.task_id, result="failed", detail=str(e))
 928                else:
 929                    print(f"  🤖 [{name}] → {task.required_capability}: {task.description[:60]}...")
 930                    self._execution_engine.submit_result(
 931                        task.task_id,
 932                        agent_id,
 933                        {
 934                            "status": "completed",
 935                            "artifact": {
 936                                "content_type": "application/json",
 937                                "content": {"result": f"Task {task.task_id} completed"},
 938                            },
 939                        },
 940                    )
 941                    self._audit("system", "task.completed", task.task_id, detail="auto-completed (demo mode)")
 942
 943    # ═══════════════════ Goal Submission ═══════════════════
 944
 945    def submit_goal(
 946        self,
 947        description: str,
 948        *,
 949        budget: float | None = None,
 950        deadline: str | None = None,
 951        priority: str = "medium",
 952        project_id: str | None = None,
 953        metadata: dict | None = None,
 954        auth_context: dict | None = None,
 955        require_approval: bool = False,
 956        approvers: list[str] | None = None,
 957    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
 958        """Submit a Goal. Phase 3: RBAC + tenant quota + audit.
 959
 960        Args:
 961            require_approval: If True, creates HITL approval before tasks dispatch.
 962            approvers: List of approver IDs for HITL.
 963        """
 964        if not description or not description.strip():
 965            return {"goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()), "status": "rejected", "reason": "Description is required"}
 966
 967        if priority not in ("low", "medium", "high", "critical"):
 968            return {
 969                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
 970                "status": "rejected",
 971                "reason": f"Invalid priority: {priority}",
 972                "validation_errors": ["priority must be one of: low, medium, high, critical"],
 973            }
 974
 975        # Auth
 976        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "goal.submit", "goal:new")
 977        if err:
 978            return err
 979
 980        # Tenant
 981        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
 982        tenant = self._tenant_manager.get_tenant(tenant_id)
 983        if tenant and not tenant.active:
 984            return {
 985                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
 986                "status": "rejected",
 987                "reason": f"Tenant '{tenant_id}' is deactivated",
 988            }
 989
 990        ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
 991        if ns and not ns.check_quota("goals"):
 992            return {
 993                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
 994                "status": "rejected",
 995                "reason": f"Goal quota exceeded for tenant '{tenant_id}'",
 996            }
 997
 998        if budget and ns and not ns.quotas.check_budget(budget):
 999            return {
1000                "goal_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
1001                "status": "rejected",
1002                "reason": f"Budget ${budget} exceeds per-goal limit ${ns.quotas.budget_per_goal}",
1003            }
1004
1005        goal_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
1006        plan_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
1007
1008        goal = {
1009            "goal_id": goal_id,
1010            "description": description,
1011            "status": "accepted",
1012            "budget": budget,
1013            "deadline": deadline,
1014            "priority": priority,
1015            "project_id": project_id,
1016            "metadata": metadata or {},
1017            "plan_id": plan_id,
1018            "tenant_id": tenant_id,
1019            "created_at": time.time(),
1020            "updated_at": time.time(),
1021            "completed_at": None,
1022            "progress": {
1023                "total_tasks": 0,
1024                "completed_tasks": 0,
1025                "failed_tasks": 0,
1026                "ready_tasks": 0,
1027                "in_flight_tasks": 0,
1028                "blocked_tasks": 0,
1029                "percent_complete": 0.0,
1030            },
1031        }
1032        with self._lock:
1033            self._goals[goal_id] = goal
1034
1035        if ns:
1036            ns.add_goal(goal_id)
1037
1038        # HITL: create approval request if required
1039        if require_approval and approvers:
1040            self._hitl.create_request(
1041                task_id=f"{goal_id}-approval",
1042                description=f"Goal approval: {description[:80]}",
1043                approvers=approvers,
1044                context={"goal_id": goal_id, "budget": budget, "priority": priority},
1045                require_all=len(approvers) > 1,
1046            )
1047
1048        self._audit(
1049            actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1050            action="goal.submit",
1051            resource=goal_id,
1052            detail=f"'{description[:60]}' in tenant '{tenant_id}'",
1053            budget=budget,
1054            priority=priority,
1055        )
1056
1057        # Planner: decompose Goal → Tasks
1058        if self._planner is not None and self._running:
1059            try:
1060                planner_plan = self._planner.plan(description, goal_id=goal_id)
1061                planner_plan.plan_id = plan_id
1062            except Exception:
1063                from .planner import PlannerTask as PT
1064
1065                planner_plan = PlannerPlan(
1066                    plan_id=plan_id,
1067                    goal_id=goal_id,
1068                    tasks=[],
1069                    planner_id="fallback",
1070                )
1071                planner_plan.tasks.append(
1072                    PT(
1073                        task_id=f"{goal_id}-t1",
1074                        description=description,
1075                        required_capability="code-generation.python",
1076                    )
1077                )
1078
1079            for pt in planner_plan.tasks:
1080                task = Task(
1081                    task_id=pt.task_id,
1082                    plan_id=plan_id,
1083                    description=pt.description,
1084                    required_capability=pt.required_capability,
1085                    dependencies=list(pt.dependencies),
1086                    priority=pt.priority,
1087                    timeout_ms=pt.timeout_ms,
1088                )
1089                self._task_graph.add_task(task)
1090
1091            for dep in planner_plan.dependencies:
1092                try:
1093                    self._task_graph.add_dependency(dep["from_task_id"], dep["to_task_id"])
1094                except ValueError:
1095                    pass
1096
1097            self._task_graph.evaluate_all()
1098
1099            goal["status"] = "planned"
1100            goal["plan_id"] = plan_id
1101            goal["updated_at"] = time.time()
1102
1103        task_count = len([t for t in self._task_graph.list_tasks() if t.plan_id == plan_id])
1104
1105        return {
1106            "goal_id": goal_id,
1107            "status": goal["status"],
1108            "created_at": goal["created_at"],
1109            "plan_id": plan_id,
1110            "task_count": task_count,
1111        }
1112
1113    def get_goal_status(self, goal_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1114        """Get goal status. Phase 3: tenant-filtered."""
1115        goal = self._goals.get(goal_id)
1116        if not goal:
1117            return None
1118
1119        # Tenant isolation
1120        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
1121        if tenant_id != "default" and goal.get("tenant_id", "default") != tenant_id:
1122            return None
1123
1124        tasks = self._task_graph.list_tasks()
1125        plan_id = goal.get("plan_id", "")
1126        goal_tasks = [t for t in tasks if t.plan_id == plan_id]
1127
1128        total = len(goal_tasks)
1129        completed = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED)
1130        failed = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.FAILED)
1131        ready = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.READY)
1132        in_flight = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status in (TaskStatus.ASSIGNED, TaskStatus.STARTED))
1133        blocked = sum(1 for t in goal_tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.CREATED)
1134
1135        goal["progress"] = {
1136            "total_tasks": total,
1137            "completed_tasks": completed,
1138            "failed_tasks": failed,
1139            "ready_tasks": ready,
1140            "in_flight_tasks": in_flight,
1141            "blocked_tasks": blocked,
1142            "percent_complete": (completed / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0.0,
1143        }
1144        goal["updated_at"] = time.time()
1145        return {
1146            "goal_id": goal["goal_id"],
1147            "status": goal["status"],
1148            "plan_id": goal["plan_id"],
1149            "progress": goal["progress"],
1150            "created_at": goal["created_at"],
1151            "updated_at": goal["updated_at"],
1152            "completed_at": goal["completed_at"],
1153            "tenant_id": goal.get("tenant_id", "default"),
1154        }
1155
1156    def cancel_goal(self, goal_id: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1157        """Cancel a goal. Phase 3: RBAC + audit."""
1158        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "goal.cancel", goal_id)
1159        if err:
1160            return err
1161
1162        goal = self._goals.get(goal_id)
1163        if not goal:
1164            return None
1165        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
1166        if tenant_id != "default" and goal.get("tenant_id", "default") != tenant_id:
1167            return {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "rejected", "reason": "Goal not in this tenant"}
1168
1169        if goal["status"] in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
1170            return {
1171                "goal_id": goal_id,
1172                "status": goal["status"],
1173                "error": {"code": "conflict", "message": "Goal is already in a terminal state"},
1174            }
1175        goal["status"] = "cancelled"
1176        goal["completed_at"] = time.time()
1177        self._audit(
1178            actor=auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1179            action="goal.cancel",
1180            resource=goal_id,
1181        )
1182        return {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "cancelled"}
1183
1184    def wait_for_goal(self, goal_id: str, timeout_seconds: float = 600, poll_interval: float = 1.0) -> dict[str, Any]:
1185        """Block until goal reaches a terminal state."""
1186        deadline = time.time() + timeout_seconds
1187        while time.time() < deadline:
1188            status = self.get_goal_status(goal_id)
1189            if status is None:
1190                return {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "not_found"}
1191            if status["status"] in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
1192                return status
1193            time.sleep(poll_interval)
1194        status = self.get_goal_status(goal_id)
1195        return status or {"goal_id": goal_id, "status": "timeout"}
1196
1197    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Advanced Execution API ═══════════════════
1198
1199    def modify_plan(self, plan_id: str, operation: str, **kwargs) -> dict[str, Any]:
1200        """Dynamically modify a running plan.
1201
1202        Operations: add_task, remove_task, modify_task, add_dependency, remove_dependency
1203        """
1204        try:
1205            if operation == "add_task":
1206                if "plan_id" not in kwargs:
1207                    kwargs["plan_id"] = plan_id
1208                self._plan_modifier.add_task(**kwargs)
1209            elif operation == "remove_task":
1210                ok = self._plan_modifier.remove_task(kwargs["task_id"])
1211                if not ok:
1212                    return {"status": "failed", "reason": f"Task '{kwargs['task_id']}' not found"}
1213            elif operation == "modify_task":
1214                task_id = kwargs.pop("task_id")
1215                self._plan_modifier.modify_task(task_id, **kwargs)
1216            elif operation == "add_dependency":
1217                self._plan_modifier.add_dependency(kwargs["from_task_id"], kwargs["to_task_id"])
1218            elif operation == "remove_dependency":
1219                self._plan_modifier.remove_dependency(kwargs["from_task_id"], kwargs["to_task_id"])
1220            else:
1221                return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Unknown operation: {operation}"}
1222            self._audit("system", f"plan.{operation}", plan_id, detail=str(kwargs))
1223            return {"status": "ok", "operation": operation}
1224        except (ValueError, KeyError) as e:
1225            return {"status": "failed", "reason": str(e)}
1226        except Exception as e:
1227            return {"status": "failed", "reason": str(e)}
1228
1229    def spawn_sub_goal(
1230        self,
1231        parent_task_id: str,
1232        description: str,
1233        budget: float | None = None,
1234        required_capability: str = "code-generation.python",
1235        num_tasks: int = 1,
1236    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1237        """Spawn a sub-goal from a parent task."""
1238        sub = self._sub_goal_manager.spawn_sub_goal(
1239            parent_task_id=parent_task_id,
1240            description=description,
1241            budget=budget,
1242            required_capability=required_capability,
1243            num_tasks=num_tasks,
1244        )
1245        self._audit("system", "sub_goal.spawned", sub["sub_goal_id"], detail=description[:60])
1246        return sub
1247
1248    def get_sub_goal_status(self, sub_goal_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1249        return self._sub_goal_manager.get_sub_goal(sub_goal_id)
1250
1251    def approve_task(self, task_id: str, approver: str, comment: str = "") -> dict[str, Any]:
1252        """Approve a HITL request for a task."""
1253        pending = [r for r in self._hitl.list_pending() if r.task_id == task_id]
1254        if not pending:
1255            # Try direct request_id
1256            ok = self._hitl.approve(task_id, approver, comment)
1257            if ok:
1258                self._audit(approver, "hitl.approve", task_id, comment)
1259                return {"status": "approved"}
1260            return {"status": "not_found", "reason": "No pending approval for this task"}
1261        req = pending[0]
1262        ok = self._hitl.approve(req.request_id, approver, comment)
1263        if ok:
1264            self._audit(approver, "hitl.approve", task_id, comment)
1265            return {"status": "approved"}
1266        return {"status": "failed", "reason": "Approval rejected — approver not authorized"}
1267
1268    def reject_task(self, task_id: str, approver: str, reason: str = "") -> dict[str, Any]:
1269        """Reject a HITL request for a task."""
1270        pending = [r for r in self._hitl.list_pending() if r.task_id == task_id]
1271        if not pending:
1272            ok = self._hitl.reject(task_id, approver, reason)
1273            if ok:
1274                self._audit(approver, "hitl.reject", task_id, reason)
1275                # Try to fail the task in graph if it exists
1276                try:
1277                    if task_id in self._task_graph._tasks:
1278                        self._task_graph.transition(task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)
1279                except (ValueError, KeyError):
1280                    pass
1281                return {"status": "rejected"}
1282            return {"status": "not_found"}
1283        req = pending[0]
1284        ok = self._hitl.reject(req.request_id, approver, reason)
1285        if ok:
1286            self._audit(approver, "hitl.reject", task_id, reason)
1287            # Try to fail the associated task in graph (it may be a goal-id, not task-id)
1288            try:
1289                if task_id in self._task_graph._tasks:
1290                    self._task_graph.transition(task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)
1291            except (ValueError, KeyError):
1292                pass
1293            # Find goal by task_id pattern and cancel it
1294            for gid, goal in list(self._goals.items()):
1295                if goal["status"] not in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled"):
1296                    if task_id.startswith(gid + "-approval"):
1297                        goal["status"] = "failed"
1298                        goal["completed_at"] = time.time()
1299                        self._audit(approver, "goal.failed", gid, detail=f"Rejected: {reason}")
1300                        break
1301            return {"status": "rejected"}
1302        return {"status": "failed", "reason": "Rejection denied — approver not authorized"}
1303
1304    def list_pending_approvals(self) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1305        """List all pending HITL approval requests."""
1306        return [
1307            {
1308                "request_id": r.request_id,
1309                "task_id": r.task_id,
1310                "description": r.description,
1311                "approvers": r.approvers,
1312                "require_all": r.require_all,
1313                "created_at": r.created_at,
1314                "status": r.status.value,
1315            }
1316            for r in self._hitl.list_pending()
1317        ]
1318
1319    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Hot Reload API ═══════════════════
1320
1321    def reload_plugin(self, plugin_id: str, new_entrypoint: str, new_version: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1322        """Hot-reload a plugin to a new version."""
1323        current = self._hot_reload_manager.get_active_version(plugin_id)
1324        if current and current.version == new_version:
1325            return {"status": "ok", "message": f"Already at version {new_version}"}
1326
1327        # Drain current version
1328        if current:
1329            self._hot_reload_manager.drain_version(plugin_id, current.version)
1330
1331        # Register new version (auto-activates as latest)
1332        self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(
1333            plugin_id, new_version, new_entrypoint, checksum=f"reload-{int(time.time())}"
1334        )
1335
1336        # Reload in plugin manager
1337        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1338            if inst.manifest.plugin_id == plugin_id:
1339                self._plugin_manager.stop_plugin(plugin_id)
1340                inst.manifest.entrypoint = new_entrypoint
1341                self._plugin_manager.start_plugin(plugin_id)
1342                break
1343
1344        self._audit("system", "plugin.reload", plugin_id, detail=f"Reloaded to {new_version} ({new_entrypoint})")
1345        return {"status": "ok", "plugin_id": plugin_id, "version": new_version}
1346
1347    def rollback_plugin(self, plugin_id: str, target_version: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1348        """Rollback a plugin to a previous version."""
1349        target = self._hot_reload_manager.get_version(plugin_id, target_version)
1350        if not target:
1351            return {"status": "failed", "reason": f"Version {target_version} not found for {plugin_id}"}
1352
1353        ok = self._hot_reload_manager.rollback(plugin_id, target_version)
1354        if ok:
1355            self._audit("system", "plugin.rollback", plugin_id, detail=f"Rolled back to {target_version}")
1356            return {"status": "ok", "plugin_id": plugin_id, "version": target_version}
1357        return {"status": "failed", "reason": "Rollback failed"}
1358
1359    def set_upgrade_strategy(self, strategy_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
1360        """Change the hot reload upgrade strategy."""
1361        try:
1362            strategy = UpgradeStrategy(strategy_name)
1363        except ValueError:
1364            return {
1365                "status": "failed",
1366                "reason": f"Unknown strategy: {strategy_name}. Available: {[s.value for s in UpgradeStrategy]}",
1367            }
1368        self._hot_reload_manager.set_upgrade_strategy(strategy)
1369        return {"status": "ok", "strategy": strategy.value}
1370
1371    def get_plugin_versions(self, plugin_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1372        """Get version history for a plugin."""
1373        return [v.to_dict() for v in self._hot_reload_manager.get_versions(plugin_id)]
1374
1375    def _on_plugin_file_change(self, change_event: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
1376        """Handle file watcher events for hot reload.
1377
1378        Implements real strategy differentiation:
1379          - ROLLING: reload one at a time (simulated as instant for in-process)
1380          - BLUE_GREEN: register new version, keep old running until new is healthy
1381          - CANARY: register with canary_percent, route accordingly
1382          - INSTANT: immediate reload
1383
1384        Matches the changed file to actually registered plugins by checking
1385        if the module path contains the filename stem.
1386        """
1387        filename = change_event.get("filename", "")
1388        file_stem = filename.replace(".py", "")
1389
1390        # Find matching plugin(s) in the plugin manager — don't guess from filename
1391        matched_plugins = []
1392        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1393            entrypoint = inst.manifest.entrypoint or ""
1394            # Match if entrypoint contains the file stem (e.g. "plugins.my_plugin:v1")
1395            if file_stem in entrypoint or inst.manifest.plugin_id == file_stem:
1396                matched_plugins.append(inst.manifest.plugin_id)
1397
1398        if not matched_plugins:
1399            return  # File changed but no matching plugin — safe no-op
1400
1401        strategy = self._hot_reload_manager.upgrade_strategy
1402        timestamp = int(time.time())
1403
1404        for plugin_id in matched_plugins:
1405            if strategy == UpgradeStrategy.CANARY:
1406                new_ver = f"canary-{timestamp}"
1407                self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(
1408                    plugin_id, new_ver, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id), canary_percent=10
1409                )
1410                # Old version still gets 90% via _route_canary()
1411
1412            elif strategy == UpgradeStrategy.BLUE_GREEN:
1413                new_ver = f"bg-{timestamp}"
1414                self._hot_reload_manager.register_version(plugin_id, new_ver, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id))
1415                # Old version stays active — explicit cutover via reload_plugin()
1416
1417            elif strategy == UpgradeStrategy.INSTANT:
1418                new_ver = f"instant-{timestamp}"
1419                self.reload_plugin(plugin_id, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id), new_ver)
1420
1421            else:  # ROLLING (default)
1422                new_ver = f"rolling-{timestamp}"
1423                self.reload_plugin(plugin_id, self._get_plugin_entrypoint(plugin_id), new_ver)
1424
1425    def _get_plugin_entrypoint(self, plugin_id: str) -> str:
1426        """Get the current entrypoint of a plugin by its ID."""
1427        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1428            if inst.manifest.plugin_id == plugin_id:
1429                return inst.manifest.entrypoint or f"plugins.{plugin_id}:unknown"
1430        return f"plugins.{plugin_id}:unknown"
1431
1432    def _route_canary(self, plugin_id: str) -> str | None:
1433        """CANARY routing: return which version to use based on canary_percent.
1434
1435        This is called before dispatching a task to a plugin. Returns the
1436        version string to use, or None to use the default active version.
1437        """
1438        versions = self._hot_reload_manager.get_versions(plugin_id)
1439        active_version = None
1440        canary_version = None
1441
1442        for v in versions:
1443            if v.status == "active" and v.canary_percent > 0:
1444                canary_version = v
1445            elif v.status == "active" and v.canary_percent == 0:
1446                active_version = v
1447
1448        if not canary_version:
1449            return None  # No canary in progress — use default
1450
1451        # Route based on canary_percent
1452        import random
1453
1454        if random.randint(1, 100) <= canary_version.canary_percent:
1455            return canary_version.version  # Route to canary
1456        return active_version.version if active_version else None  # Route to stable
1457
1458    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Security API ═══════════════════
1459
1460    def validate_api_key(self, key: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
1461        """Validate an API key. Returns role info or None."""
1462        return self._api_key_manager.validate(key)
1463
1464    def generate_api_key(
1465        self, role: str, description: str = "", ttl_seconds: float | None = None, auth_context: dict | None = None
1466    ) -> str:
1467        """Generate a new API key (admin only)."""
1468        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.api_key.generate", "")
1469        if err:
1470            return ""
1471        key = self._api_key_manager.generate_key(role, description, ttl_seconds)
1472        self._audit(
1473            auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1474            "api_key.generate",
1475            role[:8],
1476            detail=f"Generated key for role '{role}' ({description})",
1477        )
1478        return key
1479
1480    def revoke_api_key(self, key: str, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> bool:
1481        """Revoke an API key (admin only)."""
1482        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.api_key.revoke", "")
1483        if err:
1484            return False
1485        ok = self._api_key_manager.revoke(key)
1486        if ok:
1487            self._audit(
1488                auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system",
1489                "api_key.revoke",
1490                "",
1491                detail="Key revoked",
1492            )
1493        return ok
1494
1495    def get_audit_log(self, auth_context: dict | None = None, **filters) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1496        """Query audit log (admin/operator only)."""
1497        err = self._check_auth(auth_context or {}, "admin.audit.read", "")
1498        if err:
1499            return []
1500        events = self._audit_logger.query(**filters)
1501        return [e.to_dict() for e in events]
1502
1503    def add_role(
1504        self, name: str, permissions: list[str], description: str = "", auth_context: dict | None = None
1505    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1506        """Add a custom RBAC role."""
1507        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.role.manage", name)
1508        if err:
1509            return err
1510        self._access_control.add_role(name, permissions, description)
1511        self._audit(auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system", "role.add", name)
1512        return {"status": "ok", "role": name}
1513
1514    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Multi-tenancy API ═══════════════════
1515
1516    def register_tenant(
1517        self,
1518        tenant_id: str,
1519        name: str = "",
1520        quotas: dict | None = None,
1521        metadata: dict | None = None,
1522        auth_context: dict | None = None,
1523    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
1524        """Register a new tenant."""
1525        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "admin.tenant.manage", tenant_id)
1526        if err:
1527            return err
1528        rq = ResourceQuota(**(quotas or {}))
1529        self._tenant_manager.register_tenant(tenant_id, name, rq, metadata)
1530        self._audit(
1531            auth_context.get("actor", "system") if auth_context else "system", "tenant.register", tenant_id, detail=name
1532        )
1533        return {"status": "ok", "tenant_id": tenant_id}
1534
1535    def list_tenants(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
1536        """List all tenants."""
1537        return [t.to_dict() for t in self._tenant_manager.list_tenants()]
1538
1539    def get_tenant_usage(self, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
1540        """Get usage report across all tenants."""
1541        return self._tenant_manager.get_usage_report()
1542
1543    # ═══════════════════ Phase 3: Distributed API ═══════════════════
1544
1545    def is_leader(self) -> bool:
1546        """Check if this node is the cluster leader."""
1547        return self._leader_election.is_leader()
1548
1549    def get_cluster_status(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
1550        """Get cluster-wide status."""
1551        status = self._node_registry.cluster_status()
1552        status["this_node"] = self._node_id
1553        status["is_leader"] = self._leader_election.is_leader()
1554        status["leader_id"] = self._leader_election.get_leader_id()
1555        return status
1556
1557    def get_work_queue_depth(self) -> int:
1558        """Get local work queue depth."""
1559        return self._work_stealing.queue_size()
1560
1561    # ═══════════════════ Admin ═══════════════════
1562
1563    def get_health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
1564        agent_count = len(self._execution_engine.list_agents())
1565        connected = sum(1 for a in self._execution_engine.list_agents() if a.status == "heartbeating")
1566        plugin_statuses = {}
1567        for inst in self._plugin_manager.list_plugins():
1568            plugin_statuses[inst.manifest.plugin_id] = inst.status.value if inst.status else "unknown"
1569
1570        # Phase 3 additions
1571        audit_count = self._audit_logger.total_events()
1572        tenant_count = self._tenant_manager.tenant_count()
1573        pending_approvals = self._hitl.get_pending_count()
1574
1575        return {
1576            "status": "healthy" if self._running else "degraded",
1577            "uptime_seconds": time.time() - self._started_at if self._started_at > 0 else 0,
1578            "components": {
1579                "kernel": "healthy" if self._running else "degraded",
1580                "plugins": {
1581                    "total": len(plugin_statuses),
1582                    "healthy": sum(1 for s in plugin_statuses.values() if s == "RUNNING"),
1583                    "degraded": sum(1 for s in plugin_statuses.values() if s == "ERROR"),
1584                    "error": sum(1 for s in plugin_statuses.values() if s == "ERROR"),
1585                },
1586                "agents": {"total": agent_count, "connected": connected, "disconnected": agent_count - connected},
1587                "security": {"audit_events": audit_count, "mTLS_configured": self._tls_config.is_configured()},
1588                "multi_tenancy": {"tenants": tenant_count},
1589                "hitl": {"pending_approvals": pending_approvals},
1590                "cluster": {"enabled": self._cluster_enabled, "is_leader": self._leader_election.is_leader()},
1591            },
1592            "version": "0.7.0",
1593        }
1594
1595    def get_metrics(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
1596        tasks = self._task_graph.list_tasks()
1597        return {
1598            "goals": {
1599                "active": sum(
1600                    1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] not in ("completed", "failed", "cancelled")
1601                ),
1602                "completed_total": sum(1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] == "completed"),
1603                "failed_total": sum(1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] == "failed"),
1604                "cancelled_total": sum(1 for g in self._goals.values() if g["status"] == "cancelled"),
1605            },
1606            "tasks": {
1607                "in_flight": self._execution_engine.in_flight_count,
1608                "completed_total": sum(1 for t in tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.COMPLETED),
1609                "failed_total": sum(1 for t in tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.FAILED),
1610                "timed_out_total": sum(1 for t in tasks if t.status == TaskStatus.TIMED_OUT),
1611                "avg_completion_ms": 0,
1612            },
1613            "agents": {
1614                "registered": len(self._execution_engine.list_agents()),
1615                "connected": sum(1 for a in self._execution_engine.list_agents() if a.status == "heartbeating"),
1616                "avg_success_rate": 0.9,
1617                "total_tasks_dispatched": 0,
1618            },
1619            "events": {"published_total": self._event_bus.total_events(), "events_per_second": 0},
1620            # Phase 3
1621            "security": {
1622                "audit_events": self._audit_logger.total_events(),
1623                "active_api_keys": len(self._api_key_manager.list_keys()),
1624            },
1625            "multi_tenancy": {
1626                "tenants": self._tenant_manager.tenant_count(),
1627                "usage": self._tenant_manager.get_usage_report(),
1628            },
1629            "hitl": {"pending_approvals": self._hitl.get_pending_count()},
1630            "hot_reload": {"plugins_tracked": len(self._hot_reload_manager.list_plugins())},
1631            "cluster": {
1632                "enabled": self._cluster_enabled,
1633                "nodes": self._node_registry.node_count() if self._cluster_enabled else 0,
1634                "is_leader": self._leader_election.is_leader(),
1635            },
1636        }

Central entry point. Owns Kernel lifecycle and Agent lifecycle.

Supports:
  • Dict config: ZelosRuntime({"plugins": [...]})
  • YAML file: ZelosRuntime.from_yaml("zelos.yaml")

Phase 3: Integrated security (RBAC + audit), multi-tenancy (quotas + isolation), advanced execution (dynamic plans + sub-goals + HITL), hot reload (strategies), and distributed coordination (leader election + work stealing).

ZelosRuntime(config: dict[str, typing.Any] | None = None) 
 51    def __init__(self, config: dict[str, Any] | None = None):
 52        self.config = config or {}
 53
 54        # ── Phase 1 & 2: Kernel ──
 55        self._event_bus = EventBus()
 56        self._capability_registry = CapabilityRegistry()
 57        self._task_graph = TaskGraphEngine()
 58        self._plugin_manager = PluginLifecycleManager()
 59        self._scoring_strategy: ScoringStrategy | None = None
 60        self._policy_plugin: PolicyPlugin | None = None
 61        self._policy_engine: CompositePolicy | None = None
 62        self._planner: LLMPlanner | None = None
 63        self._verifier_gate: VerificationGate | None = None
 64        self._memory_provider: InMemoryMemoryProvider | None = None
 65        self._context_assembler: ContextAssembler | None = None
 66        self._scheduler: Scheduler | None = None
 67        self._execution_engine = ExecutionEngine(self._task_graph, self._event_bus)
 68        self._goals: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
 69        self._agents: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}  # name → {agent info}
 70        self._agent_instances: dict[str, Any] = {}  # name → agent object
 71        self._agent_threads: dict[str, threading.Thread] = {}
 72        self._orchestrator_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
 73        self._running = False
 74        self._lock = threading.RLock()
 75        self._started_at: float = 0.0
 76
 77        # ── Phase 3: Security ──
 78        sec_cfg = self.config.get("security", {})
 79        self._access_control = AccessControl()
 80        self._audit_logger = AuditLogger(max_events=sec_cfg.get("audit_max_events", 100000))
 81        self._api_key_manager = APIKeyManager()
 82        self._tls_config = TLSConfig(
 83            cert_file=sec_cfg.get("cert_file", ""),
 84            key_file=sec_cfg.get("key_file", ""),
 85            ca_file=sec_cfg.get("ca_file", ""),
 86            require_client_cert=sec_cfg.get("require_client_cert", True),
 87            min_tls_version=sec_cfg.get("min_tls_version", "TLSv1.2"),
 88            verify_hostname=sec_cfg.get("verify_hostname", True),
 89        )
 90
 91        # ── Phase 3: Multi-tenancy ──
 92        mt_cfg = self.config.get("multi_tenancy", {})
 93        self._tenant_manager = TenantManager()
 94        if mt_cfg.get("enabled", False):
 95            for tenant_spec in mt_cfg.get("tenants", []):
 96                self._tenant_manager.register_tenant(
 97                    tenant_id=tenant_spec["id"],
 98                    name=tenant_spec.get("name", ""),
 99                    quotas=ResourceQuota(**tenant_spec.get("quotas", {})),
100                    metadata=tenant_spec.get("metadata", {}),
101                )
102
103        # ── Phase 3: Advanced Execution ──
104        self._plan_modifier = DynamicPlanModifier(self._task_graph)
105        self._sub_goal_manager = SubGoalManager(self._task_graph)
106        self._hitl = HumanInTheLoop()
107
108        # ── Phase 3: Hot Reload ──
109        hr_cfg = self.config.get("hot_reload", {})
110        strategy_name = hr_cfg.get("upgrade_strategy", "rolling")
111        try:
112            strategy = UpgradeStrategy(strategy_name)
113        except ValueError:
114            strategy = UpgradeStrategy.ROLLING
115        self._hot_reload_manager = HotReloadManager(upgrade_strategy=strategy)
116        self._file_watcher: FileWatcher | None = None
117
118        # ── Phase 3: Distributed ──
119        dist_cfg = self.config.get("distributed", {})
120        self._node_id = dist_cfg.get("node_id", f"zelos-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}")
121        self._leader_election = LeaderElection(
122            node_id=self._node_id,
123            heartbeat_interval_ms=dist_cfg.get("heartbeat_ms", 500),
124        )
125        self._node_registry = NodeRegistry(heartbeat_timeout_seconds=dist_cfg.get("heartbeat_timeout_s", 30.0))
126        self._work_stealing = WorkStealing(
127            node_id=self._node_id,
128            max_concurrent_tasks=dist_cfg.get("max_concurrent_tasks", 50),
129        )
130        self._cluster_enabled = dist_cfg.get("enabled", False)
131
132        # ── Phase 3: Container / Remote isolation ──
133        self._container_runners: dict[str, ContainerRunner] = {}  # plugin_id → runner
134        self._remote_plugins: dict[str, RemotePlugin] = {}  # plugin_id → remote
135        self._remote_health_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
config
@classmethod
def from_yaml(cls, path: str = 'zelos.yaml') -> ZelosRuntime: 
137    @classmethod
138    def from_yaml(cls, path: str = "zelos.yaml") -> "ZelosRuntime":
139        """Create a ZelosRuntime from a zelos.yaml configuration file."""
140        loader = ConfigLoader()
141        config = loader.load(path)
142        return cls(config)

Create a ZelosRuntime from a zelos.yaml configuration file.

def add_agent( self, name: str, entrypoint: str, capabilities: list[typing.Any], *, max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5, heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000, restart_policy: str = 'always', config: dict | None = None, auth_context: dict | None = None) -> str: 
189    def add_agent(
190        self,
191        name: str,
192        entrypoint: str,
193        capabilities: list[Any],
194        *,
195        max_concurrent_tasks: int = 5,
196        heartbeat_interval_ms: int = 30000,
197        restart_policy: str = "always",
198        config: dict | None = None,
199        auth_context: dict | None = None,
200    ) -> str:
201        """Register an agent. If Runtime is running, hot-join.
202
203        Phase 3: Enforces RBAC + tenant agent quota + audit logging.
204        """
205        # Auth check
206        err = self._check_auth(auth_context, "agent.register", f"agent:{name}")
207        if err:
208            return err
209
210        tenant_id = self._resolve_tenant(auth_context)
211        tenant = self._tenant_manager.get_tenant(tenant_id)
212        if tenant and not tenant.active:
213            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Tenant '{tenant_id}' is deactivated"}
214
215        # Tenant agent quota
216        ns = self._tenant_manager.get_namespace(tenant_id)
217        if ns and not ns.check_quota("agents"):
218            return {"status": "rejected", "reason": f"Agent quota exceeded for tenant '{tenant_id}'"}
219
220        agent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
221        agent_info = {
222            "agent_id": agent_id,
223            "name": name,
224            "entrypoint": entrypoint,
225            "capabilities": capabilities,
226            "max_concurrent_tasks": max_concurrent_tasks,
227            "heartbeat_interval_ms": heartbeat_interval_ms,
